28722.title: Early Childhood Education in the United States: What, When, Where, Who, How, and Why
28722.zh_title: 美国的早期儿童教育：什么、何时、何地、谁、如何以及为什么
28722.abstract: This chapter concerns the state of the literature on early childhood education (ECE) – formal programs offering group instruction for children younger than the standard eligibility age for public education. I describe how ECE programs can be convincingly evaluated and why they may or may not work to narrow gaps in well-being across the lifecycle. The methods, the findings from their application, and their proper interpretation rest critically on who participates and when and where that participation is situated. Because there is a great deal of variation in the answers to these questions even within the United States, I focus on the U.S. experience. Over the past two decades, we have made considerable progress understanding the impacts of large-scale ECE participation in the U.S., as the literature has moved away from – despite being still strongly influenced by – small-scale model interventions. And yet, there is still much to be learned about the long-term effects of participating in ECE programs operating at scale, the mechanisms linking large-scale ECE interventions to later-life well-being, and the effects of ECE quality conditional on ECE participation.
28722.zh_abstract: 本章关注早期儿童教育（ECE）文献的现状——即针对年龄低于公共教育标准入学年龄的儿童提供集体教学的正式项目。我描述了如何令人信服地评估ECE项目，以及它们为何可能或不可能缩小生命周期中福祉差距。方法、应用结果及其正确解释关键取决于谁参与以及参与发生在何时何地。由于即使在美国，这些问题的答案也存在很大差异，我重点关注美国的经验。在过去二十年中，随着文献已从（尽管仍受其强烈影响）小规模示范干预转向，我们在理解美国大规模ECE参与的影响方面取得了相当大的进展。然而，关于参与大规模运营的ECE项目的长期影响、将大规模ECE干预与晚年福祉联系起来的机制，以及基于ECE参与的ECE质量效应，仍有许多有待了解。
28722.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：H75, I24, I28, J24, N32

28721.title: What Explains Low Old-Age Income? Evidence from the Health and Retirement Study
28721.zh_title: 什么解释了低老年收入？来自健康与退休研究的证据
28721.authors: Olivia S. Mitchell, Robert L. Clark, Annamaria Lusardi
28721.abstract: We examine respondents in the Health and Retirement Study (HRS) to observe how their financial situations unfolded as they aged. We focus on low income older adults and follow them over time to identify the factors associated with having low income at baseline and thereafter. We find that (a) real income remained relatively stable as individuals approach and enter retirement, and progress through their retirement years, and (b) labor force participation declined and thus earnings became less important with age, while Social Security and retirement savings rose as a proportion of annual income.
28721.zh_abstract: 我们考察了健康与退休研究（HRS）中的受访者，以观察他们的财务状况如何随着年龄增长而变化。我们关注低收入老年人，并随时间追踪他们，以识别与基线及之后低收入相关的因素。我们发现：（a）随着个人接近并进入退休年龄，以及度过退休岁月，实际收入保持相对稳定；（b）劳动力参与率下降，因此收入随着年龄增长变得不那么重要，而社会保障和退休储蓄占年收入的比例上升。

28720.title: Perspectives on Trade and Structural Transformation
28720.zh_title: 贸易与结构转型的视角
28720.authors: George A. Alessandria, Robert C. Johnson, Kei-Mu Yi
28720.abstract: This paper surveys macroeconomic and microeconomic perspectives on the role of international trade in structural transformation. We start by describing canonical frameworks that have been used to quantify how trade influences sectoral shares of employment and value added. We then pivot to survey micro-empirical evidence on the impact of changes in trade on the allocation of labor across sectors and productivity at the firm level. In this, we put special emphasis on the role of participation in global value chains and inward foreign direct investment in mediating these effects. Next, we evaluate evidence on the barriers to trade faced by low-income countries, with special attention to recent work that measures these costs taking firm dynamics into account. We conclude by discussing how these micro-perspectives can be integrated into macro-models to advance our understanding of structural change.
28720.zh_abstract: 本文调查了关于国际贸易在结构转型中作用的宏观经济学和微观经济学视角。我们首先描述了用于量化贸易如何影响就业和增加值的部门份额的经典框架。然后，我们转向调查关于贸易变化对跨部门劳动力配置和企业层面生产率影响的微观实证证据。在此过程中，我们特别强调了参与全球价值链和外国直接投资在调节这些影响中的作用。接下来，我们评估了低收入国家面临的贸易壁垒的证据，特别关注最近考虑企业动态来衡量这些成本的研究。最后，我们讨论了如何将这些微观视角整合到宏观模型中，以增进我们对结构变化的理解。
28720.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI；JEL：F1, F43, O11, O4

28719.title: Minority Student and Teaching Assistant Interactions in STEM
28719.zh_title: STEM领域中少数族裔学生与助教的互动
28719.authors: Daniel Oliver, Robert W. Fairlie, Glenn Millhauser, Randa Roland
28719.abstract: Graduate student teaching assistants from underrepresented groups may provide salient role models and enhanced instruction to minority students in STEM fields. We explore minority student-TA interactions in an important course in the sciences and STEM – introductory chemistry labs – at a large public university. The uncommon assignment method of students to TA instructors in these chemistry labs overcomes selection problems, and the small and active learning classroom setting with required attendance provides frequent interactions with the TA. We find evidence that underrepresented minority students are less likely to drop courses and are more likely to pass courses when assigned to minority TAs, but we do not find evidence of effects for grades and medium-term outcomes. The effects for the first-order outcomes are large with a decrease in the drop rate by 5.5 percentage points on a base of 6 percent, and an increase in the pass rate of 4.8 percentage points on a base of 93.6 percent. The findings are similar when we focus on Latinx student - Latinx TA interactions. The findings are robust to first-time vs. multiple enrollments in labs, specifications with different levels of fixed effects, limited choice of TA race, limited information of TAs, and low registration priority students. The findings have implications for debates over increasing diversity among PhD students in STEM fields because of spillovers to minority undergraduates.
28719.zh_abstract: 来自代表性不足群体的研究生助教可能为STEM领域的少数族裔学生提供显著的榜样作用和更好的教学。我们在一所大型公立大学的一门重要的科学和STEM课程——化学导论实验课中，探索了少数族裔学生与助教的互动。这些化学实验课中不常见的学生分配助教的方法克服了选择问题，而小班制和主动学习课堂环境以及强制出勤提供了与助教的频繁互动。我们发现，当被分配给少数族裔助教时，代表性不足的少数族裔学生更不容易退课，并且更有可能通过课程，但我们没有发现对成绩和中期结果有影响的证据。对首要结果的影响很大，退课率在6%的基础上下降了5.5个百分点，通过率在93.6%的基础上上升了4.8个百分点。当我们关注拉丁裔学生与拉丁裔助教的互动时，结果相似。这些发现对于首次与多次注册实验课、不同固定效应水平的设定、有限的助教种族选择、有限的助教信息以及低注册优先级学生都是稳健的。这些发现对关于增加STEM领域博士生多样性的辩论具有启示意义，因为这对少数族裔本科生有溢出效应。

28718.title: Infrequent Identity Signals and Detection Risks in Audit Correspondence Studies
28718.zh_title: 审计通信研究中不常见的身份信号与检测风险
28718.authors: Catherine Balfe, Patrick Button, Mary Penn, David Schwegman
28718.abstract: Audit correspondence studies are field experiments that test for discriminatory behavior in active markets. Researchers measure discrimination by comparing how responsive individuals ("audited units") are to correspondences from different types of people. This paper elaborates on the tradeoffs researchers face between sending audited units only one correspondence and sending them multiple correspondences, especially when including less common identity signals in the correspondences. We argue that when researchers use audit correspondence studies to measure discrimination against individuals that infrequently interact with audited units, they raise the risk that these audited units become aware they are being studied or otherwise act differently. We present the result of an audit correspondence study that demonstrates how this detection can occur when researchers send more than one correspondence from an uncommon minority group. We show how this detection leads to attenuated (downwardly biased) estimates of discrimination.
28718.zh_abstract: 审计通信研究是测试活跃市场中歧视行为的实地实验。研究人员通过比较个体（“被审计单位”）对不同类型人群通信的响应程度来衡量歧视。本文详细阐述了研究人员在仅向被审计单位发送一次通信与发送多次通信之间面临的权衡，特别是在通信中包含较不常见的身份信号时。我们认为，当研究人员使用审计通信研究来衡量针对那些与被审计单位互动不频繁的个体的歧视时，会增加这些被审计单位意识到自己正在被研究或以其他方式行为异常的风险。我们展示了一项审计通信研究的结果，该研究演示了当研究人员从不常见的少数群体发送不止一次通信时，这种检测是如何发生的。我们展示了这种检测如何导致对歧视的估计被削弱（向下偏误）。
28718.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C93, J15, J16, J71, K42, Z13

28717.title: Unions Increase Job Satisfaction in the United States
28717.zh_title: 工会提高了美国的职业满意度
28717.authors: Benjamin Artz, David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
28717.abstract: We revisit the well-known negative association between union coverage and individuals’ job satisfaction in the United States, first identified over forty years ago. We find the association has flipped since the Great Recession such that union workers are now more satisfied than their non-union counterparts. This is found to be the case for younger and older workers in the National Longitudinal Surveys of Youth of 1979 and 1997. The change is apparent when we use the panel data to account for fixed differences in those who are and are not unionized, suggesting changes in worker sorting into union status are not the reason for the change. The absence of substantial change in the union wage gap, and the stability of results when conditioning on wages, both suggest the change is not associated with changes in unions’ wage bargaining. Instead, we find some diminution in unions’ ability to lower quit rates – albeit confined to older workers - which is suggestive of a decline in their effectiveness in operating as a ‘voice’ mechanism for unionized workers. We also present evidence suggestive of unions’ ability to minimize covered workers’ exposure to underemployment, a phenomenon that has negatively impacted non-union workers.
28717.zh_abstract: 我们重新审视了美国工会覆盖与个人职业满意度之间众所周知的负相关关系，这一关系最早在四十多年前被发现。我们发现，自大衰退以来，这种关系已经逆转，以至于工会工人现在比非工会工人更满意。在1979年和1997年的全国青年纵向调查中，年轻和年长工人都是如此。当我们使用面板数据来解释工会和非工会工人之间的固定差异时，这种变化很明显，这表明工人进入工会状态的选择变化并非变化的原因。工会工资差距没有实质性变化，以及在控制工资后结果的稳定性，都表明这种变化与工会工资谈判的变化无关。相反，我们发现工会降低离职率的能力有所减弱——尽管仅限于年长工人——这表明工会作为工会工人“发言权”机制的有效性下降。我们还提出了证据，表明工会有能力最大限度地减少受覆盖工人面临就业不足的风险，这一现象对非工会工人产生了负面影响。

28716.title: Knowledge, Stigma, and HIV Testing: An Analysis of a Widespread HIV/AIDS Program
28716.zh_title: 知识、污名与HIV检测：一项广泛HIV/AIDS项目的分析
28716.authors: Dean Yang, James Allen IV, Arlete Mahumane, James Riddell IV, Hang Yu
28716.abstract: Using randomized methodologies, we study a common community HIV/AIDS program that seeks to promote HIV testing by improving knowledge and reducing stigmatizing attitudes. Contrary to expectations, the program has a substantial negative effect on HIV testing rates. We provide evidence of likely mechanisms behind the program’s negative effect: it inadvertently increased misinformation about HIV transmission methods, and worsened HIV-related stigmatizing attitudes. Subsequent household-level randomized treatments providing correct information and addressing stigma concerns counteract the program’s negative effect on HIV testing. These findings highlight the importance of improving knowledge and alleviating stigma concerns when promoting HIV testing.
28716.zh_abstract: 我们采用随机化方法，研究了一个常见的社区HIV/AIDS项目，该项目旨在通过改善知识和减少污名化态度来促进HIV检测。与预期相反，该项目对HIV检测率产生了显著的负面效应。我们提供了该项目负面效应背后可能机制的证据：它无意中增加了关于HIV传播方式的错误信息，并加剧了与HIV相关的污名化态度。随后进行的家庭层面随机化处理，提供了正确信息并解决了污名化问题，从而抵消了该项目对HIV检测的负面效应。这些发现强调了在推广HIV检测时改善知识和缓解污名化担忧的重要性。

28715.title: The Impact of COVID-19 on Community College Enrollment and Student Success: Evidence from California Administrative Data
28715.zh_title: COVID-19对社区大学入学率与学生成功的影响：来自加州行政数据的证据
28715.abstract: Although enrollment at California’s four-year public universities mostly remained unchanged by the pandemic, the effects were substantial for students at California Community Colleges, the largest higher education system in the country. This paper provides a detailed analysis of how the pandemic impacted the enrollment patterns, fields of study, and academic outcomes of these students through the first four semesters after it started. Consistent with national trends, enrollment dropped precipitously during the pandemic – the total number of enrolled students fell by 11 percent from fall 2019 to fall 2020 and by another 7 percent from fall 2020 to fall 2021. The California Community College system lost nearly 300,000 students over this period. Our analysis reveals that enrollment reductions were largest among African-American and Latinx students, and were larger among continuing students than first-time students. We find no evidence that having a large online presence prior to the pandemic protected colleges from these negative effects. Enrollment changes were substantial across a wide range of fields and were large for both vocational courses and academic courses that can be transferred to four-year institutions. In terms of course performance, changes in completion rates, withdrawal rates, and grades primarily occurred in the spring of 2020. These findings of the effects of the pandemic at community colleges have implications for policy, impending budgetary pressures, and future research.
28715.zh_abstract: 尽管疫情对加州四年制公立大学的入学率影响不大，但对加州社区学院（全美最大的高等教育系统）的学生影响显著。本文详细分析了疫情开始后的前四个学期如何影响这些学生的入学模式、学习领域和学业成果。与全国趋势一致，疫情期间入学率急剧下降——从2019年秋季到2020年秋季，注册学生总数下降了11%，从2020年秋季到2021年秋季又下降了7%。在此期间，加州社区学院系统流失了近30万名学生。我们的分析显示，非裔和拉丁裔学生的入学率下降幅度最大，且继续学生的下降幅度大于新生。我们没有发现证据表明，在疫情前拥有强大在线课程能保护学院免受这些负面影响。入学率变化在广泛领域内都很显著，职业课程和可转入四年制院校的学术课程都出现了大幅下降。在课程表现方面，完成率、退课率和成绩的变化主要发生在2020年春季。这些关于疫情对社区大学影响的发现对政策、即将面临的预算压力以及未来研究具有启示意义。
28715.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I21, I22, I23

28714.title: Social Origins of Militias: The Extraordinary Rise of “Outraged Citizens”
28714.zh_title: 民兵的社会起源："愤怒公民"的异常崛起
28714.authors: Gauthier Marchais, Christian M. Mugaruka, Raúl Sanchez de la Sierra, David Qihang Wu
28714.abstract: We use a sharp withdrawal of the state that precipitated the emergence of a prominent militia in the Democratic Republic of the Congo to analyze the role of community in the rise of militias. First, the state withdrawal drastically increased membership into the militia, predominantly driven by various social motivations and, to a much lesser extent, private economic motivations. Second, its extraordinary nature is explained by the response to the drastic rise in insecurity it created, and driven mostly by individuals’ intrinsic social motivation to protect their community, but also extrinsic social motivations such as status concerns and social pressure. Third, the response to insecurity is in part explained by elite-driven informal community institutions’ response, which engineer extrinsic social motivations and amplify pre-existing intrinsic ones. Our findings suggest that social motivations towards the community play a central role in the rise of militias, and nuance the distinction between economic and noneconomic incentives, showing that a range of social motivations, extrinsic, are engineered by community institutions to promote militia rise; given the later predatory turn of the militia, our findings emphasize how state weakness and social motivations can trigger communities to create security capacity that persists and can be later used opportunistically.
28714.zh_abstract: 我们利用刚果民主共和国一次导致著名民兵组织出现的国家急剧撤出事件，来分析社区在民兵崛起中的作用。首先，国家撤出急剧增加了民兵成员数量，这主要由各种社会动机驱动，而私人经济动机的作用要小得多。其次，其异常性质可以通过对由此产生的安全急剧恶化的反应来解释，并且主要由个体保护其社区的内在社会动机驱动，但也包括地位担忧和社会压力等外在社会动机。第三，对不安全感的反应部分由精英驱动的非正式社区制度反应所解释，这些制度设计了外在社会动机并放大了已有的内在动机。我们的发现表明，对社区的社会动机在民兵崛起中扮演核心角色，并细化了经济与非经济激励之间的区别，显示一系列外在的社会动机是由社区制度设计以促进民兵崛起的；鉴于民兵后来转向掠夺，我们的发现强调了国家软弱和社会动机如何促使社区创建安全能力，这种能力会持续存在并可能在以后被机会主义地利用。
28714.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D15, D72, D74, Z13

28713.title: Innovation and Human Capital Policy
28713.abstract: If innovation is to be subsidized, a natural place to start is to increase the quantity and quality of human capital. Innovation, after all, begins with people. Simply stimulating the “demand side” through R&D subsidies and tax breaks may only drive up the price, rather than the volume of research activity. By contrast, increasing the supply of potential inventors can both directly increase innovation and reduce its cost. This paper examines the evidence on human capital policies for stimulating innovation such as expanding the home-grown workforce, fostering immigration, boosting universities and reducing barriers to entry into inventor careers, especially for under-represented groups. The evidence suggests targeting high ability but disadvantaged potential inventors at an early age is likely to have the largest long-run effects on growth.
28713.zh_abstract: 如果要补贴创新，一个自然的起点是增加人力资本的数量和质量。毕竟，创新始于人。仅仅通过研发补贴和税收减免来刺激“需求侧”可能只会推高价格，而不是研究活动的数量。相比之下，增加潜在发明者的供给既能直接增加创新，又能降低其成本。本文考察了刺激创新的人力资本政策的证据，例如扩大本土劳动力队伍、促进移民、提升大学水平以及减少进入发明者职业的障碍，特别是针对代表性不足的群体。证据表明，在早期阶段针对高能力但处于弱势的潜在发明者，可能对长期增长产生最大的影响。

28712.title: Policy with Stochastic Hysteresis
28712.zh_title: 具有随机滞后效应的政策
28712.abstract: The paper develops a general methodology for analyzing policies with path-dependency (hysteresis) in stochastic models with forward looking optimizing agents. Our main application is a macro-climate model with a path-dependent climate externality. We derive in closed form the dynamics of the optimal Pigouvian tax, that is, its drift and diffusion coefficients. The dynamics of the present marginal damages is given by the recently developed functional Itô formula. The dynamics of the conditional expectation process of the future marginal damages is given by a new total derivative formula that we prove. The total derivative formula represents the evolution of the conditional expectation process as a sum of the expected dynamics of hysteresis with respect to time, a form of a time derivative, and the expected dynamics of hysteresis with the shocks to the trajectory of the stochastic process, a form of a stochastic derivative. We then generalize the results. First, we propose a general class of hysteresis functionals that permits significant tractability. Second, we characterize in closed form the dynamics of the stochastic hysteresis elasticity that represents the change in the whole optimal policy process with an introduction of small hysteresis effects. Third, we determine the optimal policy process.
28712.zh_abstract: 本文发展了一种通用方法论，用于分析具有前瞻性优化主体的随机模型中具有路径依赖（滞后效应）的政策。我们的主要应用是一个具有路径依赖气候外部性的宏观气候模型。我们以封闭形式推导了最优庇古税的动态，即其漂移系数和扩散系数。当前边际损害的动态由最近发展的泛函伊藤公式给出。未来边际损害的条件期望过程的动态由我们证明的一个新的全导数公式给出。全导数公式将条件期望过程的演化表示为滞后效应关于时间的预期动态（一种时间导数形式）与滞后效应关于随机过程轨迹冲击的预期动态（一种随机导数形式）之和。然后我们推广了这些结果。首先，我们提出了一类具有显著可处理性的滞后效应泛函。其次，我们以封闭形式刻画了随机滞后弹性的动态，该弹性表示在引入微小滞后效应时整个最优政策过程的变化。第三，我们确定了最优政策过程。
28712.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：E0, H23, Q4, Q5, Q54

28711.title: Product Variety, the Cost of Living and Welfare Across Countries
28711.zh_title: 产品多样性、生活成本与跨国福利
28711.authors: Alberto Cavallo, Robert C. Feenstra, Robert Inklaar
28711.abstract: We use the structure of the Melitz (2003) model to compare the cost of living and welfare across countries, while incorporating product variety measured by the count of barcodes or firms. For 47 countries, we compare welfare relative to the United States to conventional measures of real consumption. Relative welfare is similar to or higher than that indicated by real consumption for a select group of nations in Europe and some large countries like China and Russia, but lower in most other countries. This qualitative pattern has some similarities to that found in Jones and Klenow (2016), but for very different reasons.
28711.zh_abstract: 我们利用Melitz（2003）模型的结构来比较各国之间的生活成本和福利，同时纳入了以条形码或企业数量衡量的产品多样性。对于47个国家，我们将相对于美国的福利与传统的实际消费衡量指标进行比较。对于欧洲的一批精选国家以及中国和俄罗斯等一些大国，相对福利与按实际消费所显示的水平相似或更高，但在大多数其他国家则较低。这种定性模式与Jones和Klenow（2016）的发现有一些相似之处，但原因截然不同。

28710.title: Why Have College Completion Rates Increased? An Analysis of Rising Grades
28710.zh_title: 为什么大学完成率提高了？对成绩上升的分析
28710.authors: Jeffrey T. Denning, Eric R. Eide, Kevin Mumford, Richard W. Patterson, Merrill Warnick
28710.abstract: College completion rates declined from the 1970s to the 1990s. We document that this trend has reversed--since the 1990s, college completion rates have increased. We investigate the reasons for the increase in college graduation rates. Collectively, student characteristics, institutional resources, and institution attended do not explain much of the change. However, we show that grade inflation can explain much of the change in graduation rates. We show that GPA is a strong predictor of graduation rates and that GPAs have been rising since the 1990s. We also find that in national survey data and rich administrative data from 9 large public universities increases in college GPAs cannot be explained by student demographics, preparation, and school factors. Further, we find that at a public liberal arts college, grades have increased over time conditional on final exam performance.
28710.zh_abstract: 大学完成率从1970年代到1990年代有所下降。我们记录了这种趋势已经逆转——自1990年代以来，大学完成率有所上升。我们调查了大学毕业率上升的原因。总体而言，学生特征、院校资源和所就读院校并不能解释大部分变化。然而，我们表明，成绩膨胀可以解释毕业率的大部分变化。我们显示，GPA是毕业率的强预测因子，并且自1990年代以来GPA一直在上升。我们还发现，在全国调查数据和来自9所大型公立大学的丰富行政数据中，大学GPA的增长无法用学生人口统计特征、准备情况和学校因素来解释。此外，我们发现，在一所公立文理学院，在控制期末考试表现的情况下，成绩随时间推移而提高。

28709.title: Merchants of Death: The Effect of Credit Supply Shocks on Hospital Outcomes
28709.zh_title: 死亡商人：信贷供给冲击对医院结果的影响
28709.authors: Cyrus Aghamolla, Pinar Karaca-Mandic, Xuelin Li, Richard T. Thakor
28709.abstract: This study examines the link between credit supply and hospital health outcomes. We use bank stress tests as exogenous shocks to credit access for hospitals that have lending relationships with tested banks. We find that affected hospitals shift their operations to increase resource utilization following a negative credit shock but reduce the quality of their care to patients across a variety of measures, including a significant increase in risk-adjusted readmission and mortality rates. The results indicate that access to credit can affect the quality of healthcare hospitals deliver, pointing to important spillover effects of credit market frictions on health outcomes.
28709.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了信贷供给与医院健康结果之间的联系。我们将银行压力测试作为对与受测银行有贷款关系的医院信贷获取的外生冲击。我们发现，在经历负面信贷冲击后，受影响的医院会调整其运营以增加资源利用率，但会降低对患者的护理质量，这体现在多种指标上，包括风险调整后的再入院率和死亡率显著上升。结果表明，信贷获取会影响医院提供的医疗服务质量，指出了信贷市场摩擦对健康结果的重要溢出效应。
28709.meta: Programs：CF, EH, ME；JEL：G21, G32, I11, I15

28708.title: (Re)scheduling Pollution Exposure: The Case of Surgery Schedules
28708.zh_title: （重新）安排污染暴露：以手术日程为例
28708.authors: Jialin Huang, Jianwei Xing, Eric Zou
28708.abstract: Many human activities can be strategically timed around forecastable natural hazards to mute their impacts. We study air pollution shock mitigation in a high-stakes healthcare setting: hospital surgery scheduling. Using newly available inpatient surgery records from a major city in China, we track post-surgery survival for over 1 million patients, and document a significant increase of hospital mortality among those who underwent surgeries on days with high particulate matter pollution. This effect has two special features. First, pollution on the surgery day, rather than exposure prior to hospitalization, before or after the surgery, is primarily explanatory of the excess mortality. Second, a small but high-risk group – elderly patients undergoing respiratory or cancer operations – bears a majority of pollution’s damages. Based on these empirical findings, we analyze a model of hospital surgery scheduling. For over a third of the high-risk surgeries, there exists an alternative, lower-pollution day within three days such that moving the surgery may lead to a Pareto improvement in survival.
28708.zh_abstract: 许多人类活动可以围绕可预测的自然灾害进行战略性时间安排，以减轻其影响。我们研究了一个高风险医疗环境——医院手术排程——中的空气污染冲击缓解问题。利用中国某大城市新获得的住院手术记录，我们追踪了超过100万患者的术后生存情况，并发现那些在颗粒物污染严重日子接受手术的患者，其院内死亡率显著上升。这一效应有两个特殊特征。首先，手术当天的污染，而非住院前、手术前或手术后的暴露，是超额死亡率的主要解释因素。其次，一个规模较小但高风险的人群——接受呼吸系统或癌症手术的老年患者——承担了污染损害的大部分。基于这些实证发现，我们分析了一个医院手术排程模型。对于超过三分之一的高风险手术，在三天内存在一个替代的、污染较低的日子，使得将手术移至该日可能在生存率上实现帕累托改进。

28707.title: Shaping the Habits of Teen Drivers
28707.abstract: Teens are risky drivers and often subject to extra restrictions. We examine the effects of an Australian intervention banning first-year drivers from carrying multiple passengers between 11:00pm and 4:59am, which had represented 3% of their accidents and 18% of their fatalities. Using daytime outcomes to account for counterfactual crash risks, we find the reform more than halves targeted crashes, casualties and deaths. The restriction also lowers crashes earlier in the evening and beyond the first year, suggesting it has broad and persistent effects on driving behavior. Overall, this targeted intervention delivers gains comparable to harsher restrictions that delay teen driving.
28707.zh_abstract: 青少年是高风险驾驶员，通常受到额外限制。我们考察了澳大利亚一项干预措施的效果，该措施禁止第一年驾驶员在晚上11:00至凌晨4:59之间搭载多名乘客，而这一时段此前占其事故的3%和死亡人数的18%。利用白天的事故结果来反映反事实的碰撞风险，我们发现这项改革使目标碰撞、伤亡和死亡人数减少了一半以上。该限制还降低了傍晚早些时候以及第一年之后的事故，表明它对驾驶行为产生了广泛而持久的影响。总体而言，这项有针对性的干预措施带来的收益与延迟青少年驾驶的更严格限制相当。

28706.title: Groundwater and Crop Choice in the Short and Long Run
28706.zh_title: 短期与长期的地下水与作物选择
28706.authors: Fiona Burlig, Louis Preonas, Matt Woerman
28706.abstract: Natural resource management is a dynamic problem, whose analysis is complicated by agents choosing to respond differently in the short- and long-run. Long-run considerations are particularly salient in groundwater management. We estimate farmers’ responses to changes in groundwater pumping costs in California, one of the world’s most valuable agricultural regions, where perennial crops induce dynamics via upfront costs and long-lived payoffs. Leveraging quasi-experimental variation in groundwater costs driven by regulated electricity tariffs, we estimate a dynamic discrete choice model of land use with state dependence and forward-looking farmers. Farmers’ short-run elasticity of groundwater demand is −0.79, with no cropping response. In contrast, their long-run elasticity is −0.46, including meaningful reductions in water-intensive perennial cropping and increased fallowing. Short-run analysis alone therefore yields quantitatively different conclusions. California’s flagship groundwater sustainability targets will require a 52% tax in regulated areas, which would lower perennial acreage by 10% and increase fallowing by 21%.
28706.zh_abstract: 自然资源管理是一个动态问题，其分析因主体在短期和长期内选择不同反应而变得复杂。长期考虑在地下水管理中尤为突出。我们估算了加利福尼亚州（全球最有价值的农业区之一）农民对地下水抽水成本变化的反应，该地区多年生作物通过前期成本和长期收益引入了动态性。利用受监管电价驱动的准实验性地下水成本变化，我们估计了一个包含状态依赖和前瞻性农民的土地利用动态离散选择模型。农民对地下水的短期需求弹性为-0.79，且没有作物选择反应。相比之下，其长期弹性为-0.46，包括高耗水多年生作物种植面积的大幅减少和休耕增加。因此，仅进行短期分析会得出数量上不同的结论。加利福尼亚州标志性的地下水可持续性目标将需要在受监管地区征收52%的税，这将使多年生作物面积减少10%，休耕面积增加21%。

28705.title: When Scale and Replication Work: Learning from Summer Youth Employment Experiments
28705.zh_title: 当规模与复制有效时：从夏季青年就业实验中学习
28705.abstract: Because successful human capital interventions often fail to scale or replicate, public investment decisions require understanding how program size, context, and implementation shape program effects. This paper uses two new randomized controlled trials of summer youth employment programs in Chicago and Philadelphia to demonstrate how multiple experiments can help explain replicability and inform the expansion of promising approaches. Even when these programs grow or change models across contexts, participation consistently reduces criminal justice involvement. It may also decrease the need for child protective services and behavioral health treatment. Experimental variation in program model and local provider generates no detectable heterogeneity, suggesting that effects replicate partly because variability in implementation does not matter. There is, however, individual-level heterogeneity that explains differences in effect magnitudes across populations and informs optimal targeting; youth at higher risk of socially costly outcomes experience larger benefits. Identifying more interventions that combine this pattern of treatment heterogeneity with robust replicability could aid efforts to reduce social inequality efficiently.
28705.zh_abstract: 由于成功的人力资本干预措施往往难以规模化或复制，公共投资决策需要理解项目规模、背景和实施如何塑造项目效果。本文利用芝加哥和费城两个新的夏季青年就业项目随机对照试验，展示了多个实验如何有助于解释可复制性并为有前景方法的扩展提供信息。即使这些项目在不同背景下增长或改变模式，参与始终能减少刑事司法介入。它还可能减少对儿童保护服务和行为健康治疗的需求。项目模式和当地提供者的实验性变化未产生可检测的异质性，这表明效果部分复制是因为实施中的变异性无关紧要。然而，存在个体层面的异质性，这解释了不同人群间效应量级的差异，并为最优目标定位提供信息；面临更高社会成本风险青年获得了更大收益。识别更多结合了这种处理异质性模式与稳健可复制性的干预措施，可能有助于有效减少社会不平等。

28704.title: The Economic Ripple Effects of COVID-19
28704.authors: Francisco J. Buera, Roberto N. Fattal-Jaef, Hugo Hopenhayn, P. Andres Neumeyer, Yongseok Shin
28704.abstract: What are the effects of a temporary lockdown of the economy? Do firms' deteriorating balance sheets and labor market frictions propagate and prolong the effects? We answer these questions in a model with financial and labor market frictions. The model makes quantitative predictions about the effect of lockdowns of varying magnitude and duration on output, employment and firm dynamics. We find that the effects are not persistent if (i) workers on temporary layoff can be recalled by their previous employers without having to go through the frictional labor market and (ii) the government provides employment subsidies to firms during the lockdown. However, the effects are heterogeneous and young non-essential firms are disproportionately affected. In addition, if lockdowns lead to more permanent reallocation across industries, the recession becomes more protracted. Although the paper is motivated by the lockdowns during the Covid-19 pandemic, the framework can be readily applied to large, temporary shocks of different nature.
28704.zh_abstract: 经济暂时封锁的影响是什么？企业恶化的资产负债表和劳动力市场摩擦是否会传播并延长这些影响？我们在一个包含金融和劳动力市场摩擦的模型中回答了这些问题。该模型对不同程度和持续时间封锁对产出、就业和企业动态的影响做出了定量预测。我们发现，如果（i）临时解雇的工人可以被前雇主召回而无需经过摩擦性劳动力市场，并且（ii）政府在封锁期间为企业提供就业补贴，那么这些影响不会持续。然而，影响是异质性的，年轻非必需企业受到的影响尤为严重。此外，如果封锁导致跨行业更永久的重新配置，衰退将变得更加持久。尽管本文的动机是COVID-19大流行期间的封锁，但该框架可以很容易地应用于不同性质的大规模临时冲击。

28703.title: The Effects of Default Choice on Student Loan Borrowing: Experimental Evidence from a Public Research University
28703.zh_title: 默认选择对学生贷款借款的影响：来自一所公立研究型大学的实验证据
28703.authors: Dennis A. Kramer II, Christina J. Lamb, Lindsay C. Page
28703.abstract: We explore the role of defaults and choice architecture on student loan decision-making, experimentally testing the impact pre-populating either decline or accept decisions compared to an active choice, no pre-population, decision. We demonstrate that the default choice presented does influence student loan borrowing decisions. Specifically, compared to active choice, students presented within a pre-populated decline decision were almost five percent less likely to accept all packaged loans and borrowed between 4.6 and 4.8 percent less in federal educational loans. The reductions in borrowing appears to be concentrated within unsubsidized loans with those assigned to the opt-in condition borrowing 8.3 percent less in unsubsidized loans. These changes in borrowing did not induce substitution towards private or Parent PLUS loans nor did they negatively impact enrollment, academic performance, or on-campus work outcomes in the same academic year.
28703.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了默认选择和选择架构对学生贷款决策的作用，通过实验测试了预填拒绝或接受决策与主动选择（无预填）决策相比的影响。我们证明，呈现的默认选择确实会影响学生贷款借款决策。具体来说，与主动选择相比，面对预填拒绝决策的学生接受所有打包贷款的可能性降低了近5%，联邦教育贷款借款额减少了4.6%至4.8%。借款减少似乎集中在无补贴贷款上，被分配到选择加入条件的学生无补贴贷款借款额减少了8.3%。这些借款变化并未导致向私人贷款或Parent PLUS贷款的替代，也未对同一学年的入学、学业表现或校内工作结果产生负面影响。

28702.title: The Ruble Collapse in an Online Marketplace: Some Lessons for Market Designers
28702.zh_title: 在线市场中的卢布崩溃：给市场设计者的一些教训
28702.abstract: The sharp devaluation of the ruble in 2014 increased the real returns to Russians from working in a global online labor marketplace, as contracts in this market are dollar-denominated. Russians clearly noticed the opportunity, with Russian hours-worked increasing substantially, primarily on the extensive margin—incumbent Russians already active were fairly inelastic. Contrary to the predictions of bargaining models, there was little to no pass-through of the ruble price changes in to wages. There was also no evidence of a demand-side response, with buyers not posting more "Russian friendly" jobs, suggesting limited cross-side externalities. The key findings—a high extensive margin elasticity but low intensive margin elasticity; little pass-through into wages; and little evidence of a cross-side externality—have implications for market designers with respect to pricing and supply acquisition.
28702.zh_abstract: 2014年卢布大幅贬值增加了俄罗斯人在全球在线劳动力市场工作的实际回报，因为该市场的合同以美元计价。俄罗斯人显然注意到了这一机会，俄罗斯人的工作时间大幅增加，主要是在广延边际上——已有的俄罗斯活跃工人相当缺乏弹性。与讨价还价模型的预测相反，卢布价格变化几乎没有传导至工资。也没有需求侧反应的证据，买家没有发布更多“适合俄罗斯人”的工作，这表明跨边外部性有限。关键发现——高广延边际弹性但低集约边际弹性；工资传导微弱；以及几乎没有跨边外部性的证据——对市场设计者在定价和供应获取方面具有启示意义。

28701.title: Computerization, Obsolescence, and the Length of Working Life
28701.zh_title: 计算机化、技能过时与工作寿命长度
28701.abstract: This paper analyzes how computerization affected the labor market outcomes of older workers between 1984 and 2017. Using the computerization supplements of the Current Population Survey (CPS) we show that different occupations were computerized at different times, older workers tended to start using computers with a delay compared to younger workers, but computer use within occupations converged to the same levels across age groups eventually. That is, there was a temporary knowledge gap between younger and older workers in most occupations. We estimate how this knowledge gap affected older workers’ labor market outcomes using data from the CPS and the Health and Retirement Study. Our models control for occupation and time fixed effects and in some models; we also control for full occupation-time interactions and use middle aged (age 40-49) workers as the control group. We find strong and robust negative effects of the knowledge gap on wages, and a large, temporary increase in transitions from work to non-participation, consistent with a model of creative destruction in which the computerization of jobs made older workers’ skills obsolete in birth cohorts that experienced computerization relatively late in their careers. We find larger effects on females and on middle-skilled workers.
28701.zh_abstract: 本文分析了1984年至2017年间计算机化如何影响老年工人的劳动力市场结果。利用当前人口调查（CPS）的计算机化补充数据，我们表明不同职业在不同时间实现计算机化，老年工人开始使用计算机的时间往往晚于年轻工人，但各年龄组内职业的计算机使用最终趋同于相同水平。也就是说，在大多数职业中，年轻和老年工人之间存在暂时的知识差距。我们利用CPS和健康与退休研究的数据，估计了这一知识差距如何影响老年工人的劳动力市场结果。我们的模型控制了职业和时间固定效应，在某些模型中，我们还控制了完整的职业-时间交互作用，并使用中年（40-49岁）工人作为对照组。我们发现知识差距对工资有强烈且稳健的负面影响，并且从工作到非参与状态的转变出现了大幅、暂时的增加，这与创造性破坏模型一致，在该模型中，职业的计算机化使得在职业生涯较晚阶段经历计算机化的出生队列中，老年工人的技能过时。我们发现对女性和中等技能工人的影响更大。

28700.title: Opening up Military Innovation: Causal Eﬀects of Reforms to U.S. Defense Research
28700.zh_title: 开放军事创新：美国国防研究改革的因果效应
28700.authors: Sabrina T. Howell, Jason Rathje, John Van Reenen, Jun Wong
28700.abstract: For governments procuring innovation, one choice is whether to specify desired products (a “Conventional” approach) or allow firms to suggest ideas (an “Open” approach). Using a U.S. Air Force R&D grant program, where Open and Conventional competitions were held simultaneously, we find that Open awards increase both commercial innovation and technology adoption by the military. In contrast, Conventional awards have no positive effects on new technology, but do create more program lock-in. We present evidence that openness matters independently from inducing differential selection, for example of less well-established firms. These results suggest benefits from open approaches to innovation procurement.
28700.zh_abstract: 对于采购创新的政府而言，一个选择是具体规定所需产品（“传统”方法），还是允许企业提出想法（“开放”方法）。利用美国空军研发资助项目（其中开放和传统竞赛同时进行），我们发现开放奖项能同时促进商业创新和军事技术采纳。相比之下，传统奖项对新技术没有积极影响，但会导致更多的项目锁定。我们提供的证据表明，开放性本身独立于诱导差异化选择（例如选择不太成熟的企业）而产生作用。这些结果表明，创新采购的开放方法具有益处。
28700.meta: Programs：IO, PE, PR；JEL：H56, H57, O31, O32, O33, O36, O38

28749.title: Using Social Media to Identify the Effects of Congressional Viewpoints on Asset Prices
28749.zh_title: 利用社交媒体识别国会观点对资产价格的影响
28749.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Roberto Gomez Cram, Howard Kung
28749.abstract: We use a high-frequency identification approach to document that individual politicians affect asset prices. We exploit the regular flow of viewpoints contained in Congress members’ tweets. Supportive (critical) tweets increase (decrease) the stock prices of the targeted firm and the corresponding industry in minutes around the tweet. The bulk of the stock price effects is concentrated in the tweets revealing news about future legislative action. The effects are amplified around committee meeting days, especially when the tweet originates from committee members and influential politicians. Overall, we show that Congress members’ social media accounts are an important source of political news.
28749.zh_abstract: 我们采用高频识别方法，证明个别政治家会影响资产价格。我们利用了国会议员推文中定期流露的观点。支持性（批评性）推文会在发布后几分钟内提高（降低）目标公司及相应行业的股票价格。股票价格效应的大部分集中在揭示未来立法行动新闻的推文中。在委员会会议日前后，当推文来自委员会成员或有影响力的政治家时，这种效应会放大。总体而言，我们表明国会议员的社交媒体账户是政治新闻的重要来源。

28748.title: Science as a Public Good: Public Use and Funding of Science
28748.zh_title: 科学作为公共品：科学的公共使用与资助
28748.authors: Yian Yin, Yuxiao Dong, Kuansan Wang, Dashun Wang, Benjamin Jones
28748.abstract: Knowledge of how science is consumed in public domains is essential for a deeper understanding of the role of science in human society. While science is heavily supported by public funding, common depictions suggest that scientific research remains an isolated or ‘ivory tower’ activity, with weak connectivity to public use, little relationship between the quality of research and its public use, and little correspondence between the funding of science and its public use. This paper introduces a measurement framework to examine public good features of science, allowing us to study public uses of science, the public funding of science, and how use and funding relate. Specifically, we integrate five large-scale datasets that link scientific publications from all scientific fields to their upstream funding support and downstream public uses across three public domains – government documents, the news media, and marketplace invention. We find that the public uses of science are extremely diverse, with different public domains drawing distinctively across scientific fields. Yet amidst these differences, we find key forms of alignment in the interface between science and society. First, despite concerns that the public does not engage high-quality science, we find universal alignment, in each scientific field and public domain, between what the public consumes and what is highly impactful within science. Second, despite myriad factors underpinning the public funding of science, the resulting allocation across fields presents a striking alignment with the field’s collective public use. Overall, public uses of science present a rich landscape of specialized consumption, yet collectively science and society interface with remarkable, quantifiable alignment between scientific use, public use, and funding.
28748.zh_abstract: 了解科学如何在公共领域被消费，对于更深入理解科学在人类社会中的作用至关重要。尽管科学受到公共资金的大力支持，但常见的描述表明，科学研究仍然是一项孤立或“象牙塔”式的活动，与公共使用的联系薄弱，研究质量与其公共使用之间关系不大，科学的资助与其公共使用之间也缺乏对应。本文引入了一个测量框架来审视科学的公共品特征，使我们能够研究科学的公共使用、科学的公共资助，以及使用与资助之间的关系。具体而言，我们整合了五个大规模数据集，将来自所有科学领域的科学出版物与其上游的资助支持以及下游在三个公共领域——政府文件、新闻媒体和市场发明——中的公共使用联系起来。我们发现，科学的公共使用极其多样化，不同的公共领域对不同科学领域的利用方式截然不同。然而，在这些差异之中，我们在科学与社会的接口处发现了关键的一致性形式。首先，尽管存在公众不接触高质量科学的担忧，但我们发现在每个科学领域和公共领域中，公众消费的内容与科学内部具有高影响力的内容之间存在普遍的一致性。其次，尽管科学公共资助的基础因素众多，但由此产生的跨领域资金分配与各领域的集体公共使用呈现出显著的一致性。总体而言，科学的公共使用呈现出一幅专业化消费的丰富图景，但集体来看，科学与社会的接口在科学使用、公共使用和资助之间展现出显著且可量化的一致性。

28747.title: Revisiting Capital-Skill Complementarity, Inequality, and Labor Share
28747.zh_title: 重新审视资本-技能互补性、不平等与劳动份额
28747.authors: Lee E. Ohanian, Musa Orak, Shihan Shen
28747.abstract: This paper revisits capital-skill complementarity and inequality, as in Krusell, Ohanian, Rios-Rull and Violante (KORV, 2000). Using their methodology, we study how well the KORV model accounts for more recent data, including the large changes in labor’s share of income that were not present in KORV. We study both labor share of gross income (as in KORV), and income net of depreciation. We also use non-farm business sector output as an alternative measure of production to real GDP. We find strong evidence for continued capital-skill complementarity in the most recent data, and that the model continues to closely account for the skill premium. The model captures the average level of labor share, though it overpredicts its level by 2-4 percentage points at the end of the period.
28747.zh_abstract: 本文重新审视了Krusell、Ohanian、Rios-Rull和Violante（KORV，2000）中的资本-技能互补性与不平等问题。我们使用他们的方法，研究KORV模型在多大程度上解释了更近期的数据，包括KORV中未出现的劳动收入份额的巨大变化。我们同时研究了总收入的劳动份额（如KORV）和扣除折旧后的收入。我们还使用非农商业部门产出作为实际GDP的替代生产指标。我们发现，在最新数据中，资本-技能互补性持续存在的有力证据，并且该模型继续紧密地解释了技能溢价。该模型捕捉了劳动份额的平均水平，尽管在期末其预测水平高出了2-4个百分点。
28747.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E13, E25, J23, J3, J68

28746.title: The Impact of Aggregators on Internet News Consumption
28746.zh_title: 聚合器对互联网新闻消费的影响
28746.authors: Susan Athey, Markus Mobius, Jeno Pal
28746.abstract: A policy debate centers around the question how news aggregators such as Google News affect traffic to online news sites. Many publishers view aggregators as substitutes for traditional news consumption while aggregators view themselves as complements because they make news discovery easier. We use Spain as a natural experiment because Google News shut down altogether in response to a copyright reform enacted in December 2014. We compare the news consumption of a large number of Google News users with a synthetic control group of similar non-Google News users. We find that the shutdown of Google News reduces overall news consumption by about 20% for treatment users, and reduces page views on publishers other than Google News by 10%. This decrease is concentrated around small publishers. We further find that users are able to replace some but not all of the types of news they previously read. Post-shutdown, they read less breaking news, hard news, and news that is not well covered on their favorite news publishers. These news categories explain most of the overall reduction in news consumption, and shed light on the mechanisms through which aggregators interact with traditional publishers.
28746.zh_abstract: 一场政策辩论的核心问题是，像谷歌新闻这样的新闻聚合器如何影响在线新闻网站的流量。许多出版商将聚合器视为传统新闻消费的替代品，而聚合器则将自己视为互补品，因为它们使新闻发现更容易。我们以西班牙为自然实验，因为谷歌新闻在2014年12月一项版权改革实施后完全关闭。我们比较了大量谷歌新闻用户与由类似非谷歌新闻用户组成的合成对照组的新闻消费情况。我们发现，谷歌新闻的关闭使处理用户的总体新闻消费减少了约20%，并使谷歌新闻以外出版商的页面浏览量减少了10%。这种减少集中在小型出版商身上。我们进一步发现，用户能够替换他们之前阅读的部分（但非全部）新闻类型。关闭后，他们阅读的突发新闻、硬新闻以及其最喜爱的新闻出版商未充分报道的新闻减少了。这些新闻类别解释了新闻消费总体减少的大部分原因，并揭示了聚合器与传统出版商相互作用的机制。

28744.title: The Dance Between Government and Private Investors: Public Entrepreneurial Finance around the Globe
28744.zh_title: 政府与私人投资者之间的共舞：全球公共创业融资
28744.authors: Jessica Bai, Shai Bernstein, Abhishek Dev, Josh Lerner
28744.abstract: This paper examines the interaction between governments and private capital investors when financing early-stage ventures. We first provide a simple conceptual framework to explore when collaboration between governments and private investors is likely to emerge. Using hand-collected data on 755 programs worldwide, we find that government programs frequently involve private capital investors. Collaboration is greater when governments are more effective, when programs target earlier-stage companies, and when the local private venture market is more developed. Such collaborations mostly occur through joint equity investments and matching-funds requirements. These findings underscore the importance of government synergies with local private capital markets.
28744.zh_abstract: 本文考察了在资助早期创业企业时政府与私人资本投资者之间的互动。我们首先提供了一个简单的概念框架，以探讨政府与私人投资者之间的合作何时可能产生。利用我们手工收集的全球755个项目的相关数据，我们发现政府项目经常涉及私人资本投资者。当政府效率更高、项目针对更早期公司、以及当地私人风险市场更发达时，合作程度更高。这种合作主要通过联合股权投资和配套资金要求来实现。这些发现强调了政府与当地私人资本市场协同作用的重要性。

28743.title: Women in Academic Economics: Have We Made Progress?
28743.zh_title: 经济学界的女性：我们取得进展了吗？
28743.abstract: This study uses data from Academic Analytics to examine gender differences in promotion to associate professor in economics. We found that women in economics were 15% less likely to be promoted to associate professor after controlling for cumulative publications, citations, grants and grant dollars. In contrast, we found no significant gender differences in promotion in other fields including biomedical science, physical science, political science, mathematics and statistics, and engineering. We separated the sample by the research intensity of institutions and found suggestive evidence that these results were being driven by less research-intensive institutions.
28743.zh_abstract: 本研究使用Academic Analytics的数据，考察了经济学领域晋升副教授时的性别差异。我们发现，在控制了累计发表量、引用量、资助金额和资助笔数后，经济学领域的女性晋升副教授的可能性比男性低15%。相比之下，在其他领域，包括生物医学科学、物理科学、政治学、数学与统计学以及工程学，我们没有发现显著的性别晋升差异。我们按机构的研究强度对样本进行了划分，并发现提示性证据表明，这些结果是由研究强度较低的机构驱动的。

28742.title: Credit Horizons
28742.authors: Nobuhiro Kiyotaki, John Moore, Shengxing Zhang
28742.abstract: Entrepreneurs appear to borrow largely against their near-term revenues, even when their investment has a longer horizon. In this paper, we develop a model of credit horizons. A question of particular concern to us is whether persistently low interest rates can stifle economic activity. With this in mind, our model is of a small open economy where the world interest rate is taken to be exogenous. We show that a permanent fall in the interest rate can reduce aggregate investment and growth, and even lead to a drop in the welfare of everyone in the domestic economy. We use our framework to examine how credit horizons interact with plant dynamics and the evolution of productivity. Finally, we speculate that the measurement of total investment may camouflage the true level of productive investment in plant and human capital, and give too rosy a picture of property-fuelled booms sparked by low interest rates.
28742.zh_abstract: 企业家似乎主要依靠近期收入进行借贷，即使他们的投资期限更长。在本文中，我们构建了一个信贷期限模型。我们特别关注的一个问题是，持续的低利率是否会抑制经济活动。基于此，我们的模型是一个小型开放经济体，其中世界利率被视为外生变量。我们证明，利率的永久性下降可能会减少总投资和增长，甚至导致国内经济中每个人的福利下降。我们利用我们的框架来研究信贷期限如何与工厂动态和生产率演变相互作用。最后，我们推测，对总投资额的衡量可能掩盖了工厂和人力资本方面生产性投资的真实水平，并对低利率引发的、由房地产推动的繁荣给出过于乐观的图景。

28741.title: Risk Perceptions and Protective Behaviors: Evidence from COVID-19 Pandemic
28741.zh_title: 风险认知与保护行为：来自COVID-19大流行的证据
28741.authors: M. Kate Bundorf, Jill DeMatteis, Grant Miller, Maria Polyakova, Jialu L. Streeter, Jonathan Wivagg
28741.abstract: We analyze data from a survey we administered during the COVID-19 pandemic to investigate the relationship between people's subjective risk beliefs and their protective behaviors. We report three main findings. First, on average, people substantially overestimate the absolute level of risk associated with economic activity, but have correct signals about their relative risk. Second, people who believe that they face a higher risk of infection are more likely to report avoiding economic activities. Third, government mandates restricting economic behavior attenuate the relationship between subjective risk beliefs and protective behaviors.
28741.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在COVID-19大流行期间进行的一项调查数据，以研究人们的主观风险信念与其保护行为之间的关系。我们报告了三个主要发现。首先，平均而言，人们大幅高估了经济活动相关的绝对风险水平，但对其相对风险有正确的信号。其次，认为自己面临更高感染风险的人更有可能报告避免经济活动。第三，限制经济行为的政府指令削弱了主观风险信念与保护行为之间的关系。

28740.title: Large Fiscal Episodes and Sustainable Development: Some International Evidence
28740.zh_title: 大规模财政事件与可持续发展：一些国际证据
28740.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Yothin Jinjarak, Hien Thi Kim Nguyen, Donghyun Park
28740.abstract: This paper examines the association between episodes of large fiscal impulses (expansions and adjustments) and sustainable development indicators (prosperity, resilience, and inclusivity). We provide country studies of Chile, Poland, South Africa, and Thailand, examining the components of government expenses and tax revenues, and reporting four stylized patterns from the analysis. (i) Fiscal expansions led to higher growth rates and reduced negative trade-offs, e.g., pollution and poor-health mortalities associated with economic growth. (ii) Fiscal adjustments led to a more inclusive economy, lowered poverty headcounts, improved sanitation, and cleaner technology access. (iii) Fiscal expansions followed an increase in direct taxes (especially corporate taxes) and a decline in social contributions, and preceded a decline in other direct taxes and an increase in wage bills. (iv) Fiscal adjustments followed a decline in other direct taxes and social contributions, an increase in wage bills, and preceded a decline in government consumption expenditure and transfers. In light of these findings, the domestic resource mobilization should consider the time paths of the taxes and expenditure components to understand their empirical linkages with the sustainable development outcomes in the respective countries.
28740.zh_abstract: 本文考察了大规模财政冲击（扩张与调整）事件与可持续发展指标（繁荣、韧性与包容性）之间的关联。我们提供了智利、波兰、南非和泰国的国别研究，分析了政府支出和税收收入的构成，并总结了四种典型模式：（i）财政扩张带来了更高的增长率，并减少了负面权衡，例如与经济增长相关的污染和不良健康死亡率。（ii）财政调整带来了更包容的经济，降低了贫困人口数量，改善了卫生设施，并增加了清洁技术的获取。（iii）财政扩张之前，直接税（尤其是公司税）增加，社会缴款减少；之后，其他直接税减少，工资支出增加。（iv）财政调整之前，其他直接税和社会缴款减少，工资支出增加；之后，政府消费支出和转移支付减少。基于这些发现，国内资源动员应考虑税收和支出构成的时间路径，以理解它们与各国可持续发展结果之间的实证联系。

28739.title: Knowledge Spillovers, Trade, and FDI
28739.zh_title: 知识溢出、贸易与外国直接投资
28739.abstract: This paper studies knowledge spillovers, positive externalities that augment the information set of an economic agent, and reviews the evidence on such spillovers in the context of international economic transactions. The entry discusses trade channels of knowledge transfer associated with purchases from abroad (imports) and sales to abroad (exports). Another focus is on the foreign direct investment (FDI) channel through purchases from abroad (inward FDI) and sales to abroad (outward FDI). The entry also distinguishes knowledge flows from foreign to domestic agents and from domestic to foreign agents. The entry underlines the importance of empirical methodology and data characteristics that determine the quality of econometric identification. Even though spillovers are by their very nature–as externalities–difficult to identify, over recent decades a number of advances have produced robust evidence that both trade and foreign direct investment lead to sizable knowledge spillovers. These advances have been both conceptual as well as in the areas of empirical methodology and new data.
28739.zh_abstract: 本文研究知识溢出——即增加经济主体信息集的正外部性，并回顾了在国际经济交易背景下此类溢出的证据。本文讨论了与从国外购买（进口）和向国外销售（出口）相关的知识转移的贸易渠道。另一个重点是通过从国外购买（内向外国直接投资）和向国外销售（外向外国直接投资）的外国直接投资渠道。本文还区分了从外国到国内主体和从国内到外国主体的知识流动。本文强调了决定计量经济学识别质量的实证方法和数据特征的重要性。尽管溢出本质上作为外部性难以识别，但近几十年来的一些进展已提供了稳健的证据，表明贸易和外国直接投资都会导致可观的知识溢出。这些进展既体现在概念上，也体现在实证方法和新数据领域。

28738.title: Hidden Software and Veiled Value Creation: Illustrations from Server Software Usage
28738.zh_title: 隐藏的软件与隐蔽的价值创造：来自服务器软件使用的例证
28738.authors: Raviv Murciano-Goroff, Ran Zhuo, Shane Greenstein
28738.abstract: How do you measure the value of a commodity that transacts at a price of zero from an economic standpoint? This study examines the potential for and extent of omission and misattribution in standard approaches to economic accounting with regards to open source software, an unpriced commodity in the digital economy. The study is the first to follow usage and upgrading of unpriced software over a long period of time. It finds evidence that software updates mislead analyses of sources of firm productivity and identifies several mechanisms that create issues for mismeasurement. To illustrate these mechanisms, this study closely examines one asset that plays a critical role in the digital economic activity, web server software. We analyze the largest dataset ever compiled on web server use in the United States and link it to disaggregated information on over 200,000 medium to large organizations in the United States between 2001 and 2018. In our sample, we find that the omission of economic value created by web server software is substantial and that this omission indicates there is over $\$4.5$ billion dollars of mismeasurement of server software across organizations in the United States. This mismeasurement varies by organization age, geography, industry and size. We also find that dynamic behavior, such as improvements of server technology and entry of new products, further exacerbates economic mismeasurement.
28738.zh_abstract: 如何从经济角度衡量一种以零价格交易的商品的价值？本研究考察了标准经济核算方法中关于开源软件（数字经济中一种无定价商品）的遗漏和错误归因的可能性及程度。本研究首次长期追踪无定价软件的使用和升级情况。它发现证据表明，软件更新误导了对企业生产率来源的分析，并识别出若干导致测量误差的机制。为说明这些机制，本研究深入考察了一种在数字经济活动中发挥关键作用的资产——网络服务器软件。我们分析了美国有史以来最大的网络服务器使用数据集，并将其与2001年至2018年间美国超过20万家大中型组织的细分信息相关联。在我们的样本中，我们发现网络服务器软件所创造的经济价值被遗漏的程度相当大，这种遗漏表明美国各组织间存在超过45亿美元的服务器软件测量误差。这种测量误差因组织年龄、地理位置、行业和规模而异。我们还发现，动态行为，如服务器技术的改进和新产品的进入，进一步加剧了经济测量误差。
28738.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D22, L17, L86, O3, O33

28737.title: The Backward Art of Slowing the Spread? Congregation Efficiencies during COVID-19
28737.zh_title: 减缓传播的落后技艺？COVID-19期间的聚集效率
28737.abstract: Were workers more likely to be infected by COVID-19 in their workplace, or outside it? Although both economic models of the pandemic and public health policy recommendations often presume that the workplace is less safe, economic theory predicts that group cooperation significantly increases the per capita demand for public goods. Disease prevention may also have scale economies in supply. The available data from schools, hospitals, nursing homes, warehouses, grocery stores, food processing plants, hair stylists, and airlines – covering more than a million employees and students – show employers adopting mitigation protocols in the spring of 2020. Coincident with the adoption, infection rates in workplaces typically dropped from well above household rates to well below. When this occurs, the sign of the disease externality from participating in large organizations changes from negative to positive, even while individuals continue to have an incentive to avoid large organizations due to the prevention costs they impose on members. Rational cooperative prevention sometimes results in infectious-disease patterns that are opposite of predictions from classical epidemiology.
28737.zh_abstract: 工人更可能在工作中还是工作之外感染COVID-19？尽管大流行的经济模型和公共卫生政策建议通常假定工作场所更不安全，但经济理论预测，群体合作会显著增加对公共产品的人均需求。疾病预防在供给方面也可能存在规模经济。来自学校、医院、养老院、仓库、杂货店、食品加工厂、美发师和航空公司的现有数据——涵盖超过一百万名员工和学生——显示，雇主在2020年春季采取了缓解措施。随着这些措施的采用，工作场所的感染率通常从远高于家庭感染率降至远低于家庭感染率。当这种情况发生时，参与大型组织带来的疾病外部性的符号从负变为正，即使个体由于大型组织对其成员施加的预防成本而仍有动机避免加入大型组织。理性的合作预防有时会导致传染病模式与经典流行病学的预测相反。
28737.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IO；JEL：D22, D71, H23, I18, L25

28736.title: A Policy Matrix for Inclusive Prosperity
28736.zh_title: 包容性繁荣的政策矩阵
28736.abstract: One of the biggest challenges that countries face today is the very unequal distributions of opportunities, resources, income and wealth across people. Inclusive prosperity – whereby many people from different backgrounds can benefit from economic growth, new technologies, and the fruits of globalization – remains elusive. To address these issues, societies face choices among many different policies and institutional arrangements to try to ensure a proper supply of productive jobs and activities, as well as access to education, financial means, and other endowments that prepare individuals for their participation in the economy. In this paper we offer a simple, organizing framework to think about policies for inclusive prosperity. We provide a comprehensive taxonomy of policies, distinguishing among the types of inequality they address and the stages of the economy where the intervention takes place. The taxonomy clarifies the differences among contending approaches to equity and inclusion and can help analysts assess the impacts and implications of different policies and identify potential gaps.
28736.zh_abstract: 当今各国面临的最大挑战之一是机会、资源、收入和财富在人群中的极不平等分配。包容性繁荣——即来自不同背景的许多人能够从经济增长、新技术和全球化成果中受益——仍然难以实现。为解决这些问题，社会需要在众多不同的政策和制度安排中做出选择，以确保生产性工作和活动的适当供给，以及教育、金融手段和其他禀赋的获取，这些禀赋使个人能够参与经济。在本文中，我们提供了一个简单的组织框架来思考包容性繁荣的政策。我们提供了一个全面的政策分类，区分了它们所解决的不平等类型以及干预发生的经济阶段。该分类澄清了关于公平和包容的不同方法之间的差异，可以帮助分析师评估不同政策的影响和含义，并识别潜在的差距。

28735.title: What’s Missing in Environmental (Self-)Monitoring: Evidence from Strategic Shutdowns of Pollution Monitors
28735.zh_title: 环境（自我）监测中缺失了什么：来自污染监测仪战略性关闭的证据
28735.authors: Yingfei Mu, Edward A. Rubin, Eric Zou
28735.abstract: Regulators often rely on regulated entities to self-monitor compliance, potentially creating strategic incentives for endogenous monitoring. This paper builds a framework to detect whether local governments skip air pollution monitoring when they expect air quality to deteriorate. The core of our method tests whether the timing of monitor shutdowns coincides with the counties’ air quality alerts – public advisories based on local governments’ own pollution forecasts. Applying the method to a monitor in Jersey City, NJ, suspected of a deliberate shutdown during the 2013 “Bridgegate” traffic jam, we find a 33% reduction of this monitor’s sampling rate on pollution-alert days. Building on large-scale inference tools, we then apply the method to test more than 1,300 monitors across the U.S., finding 14 metro areas with clusters of monitors showing similar strategic behavior. We assess geometric imputation and remote-sensing technologies as potential solutions to deter future strategic monitoring.
28735.zh_abstract: 监管机构通常依赖受监管实体进行自我监测以遵守规定，这可能会产生内生监测的战略激励。本文构建了一个框架，用于检测地方政府是否在预期空气质量恶化时跳过空气污染监测。我们方法的核心是检验监测仪关闭的时间是否与县的空气质量警报（基于地方政府自身污染预测的公共建议）相吻合。将该方法应用于新泽西州泽西市的一个监测仪（该监测仪在2013年“桥门”交通堵塞期间被怀疑故意关闭），我们发现该监测仪在污染警报日的采样率降低了33%。基于大规模推断工具，我们随后将该方法应用于测试美国超过1300个监测仪，发现14个大都市区存在显示类似战略行为的监测仪集群。我们评估了几何插补和遥感技术作为阻止未来战略监测的潜在解决方案。

28734.title: Normalizing Community Mask-Wearing: A Cluster Randomized Trial in Bangladesh
28734.zh_title: 规范社区口罩佩戴：孟加拉国的一项整群随机试验
28734.authors: Jason Abaluck, Laura H Kwong, Ashley Styczynski, Ashraful Haque, Md. Alamgir Kabir, Ellen Bates-Jefferys, Emily Crawford, Jade Benjamin-Chung, Salim Benhachmi, Shabib Raihan, Shadman Rahman, Neeti Zaman, Peter J. Winch, Md. Maqsud Hossain, Hasan Mahmud Reza, Stephen P. Luby, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak
28734.abstract: A randomized-trial of community-level mask promotion in rural Bangladesh during COVID-19 shows that the intervention tripled mask usage and is a cost-effective means of promoting public health.
28734.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19期间，孟加拉国农村地区进行的一项社区层面口罩推广随机试验表明，该干预措施使口罩使用率提高了两倍，并且是一种具有成本效益的促进公共卫生的手段。

28733.title: The Growing Importance of Decision-Making on the Job
28733.zh_title: 工作中决策制定日益增长的重要性
28733.abstract: Machines increasingly replace people in routine job tasks. The remaining tasks require workers to make open-ended decisions and to have “soft” skills such as problem-solving, critical thinking and adaptability. This paper documents growing demand for decision-making and explores the consequences for life-cycle earnings. Career earnings growth in the U.S. more than doubled between 1960 and 2017, and the age of peak earnings increased from the late 30s to the mid-50s. I show that a substantial share of this shift is explained by increased employment in decision-intensive occupations, which have longer and more gradual periods of earnings growth. To understand these patterns, I develop a model that nests decision-making in a standard human capital framework. Workers predict the output of uncertain, context-dependent actions. Experience reduces prediction error, improving a worker’s ability to adapt using data from similar decisions they have made in the past. Experience takes longer to accumulate in high variance, non-routine jobs. I test the predictions of the model using data from the three waves of the NLS. Life-cycle wage growth in decision-intensive occupations has increased over time, and it has increased relatively more for highly-skilled workers.
28733.zh_abstract: 机器越来越多地取代人们从事常规性工作任务。剩余的任务要求工人做出开放式决策，并具备“软”技能，如解决问题、批判性思维和适应能力。本文记录了决策制定需求的增长，并探讨了其对生命周期收入的影响。美国职业生涯收入增长在1960年至2017年间翻了一倍多，收入峰值年龄从30多岁后期增加到50多岁中期。我表明，这种转变的很大一部分是由决策密集型职业就业的增加所解释的，这些职业具有更长、更渐进的收入增长期。为了理解这些模式，我开发了一个模型，将决策制定嵌套在标准人力资本框架中。工人预测不确定的、依赖于情境的行动的产出。经验减少了预测误差，提高了工人利用过去类似决策数据来适应的能力。在高方差、非常规的工作中，积累经验需要更长时间。我使用全国纵向调查三轮数据检验了模型的预测。决策密集型职业的生命周期工资增长随时间推移而增加，并且对于高技能工人来说，这种增长相对更大。
28733.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PR；JEL：I26, J23, J24, J31

28732.title: Optimal Harvest with Multiple Fishing Zones, Endogenous Price and Global Uncertainty
28732.zh_title: 多渔区、内生价格与全球不确定性下的最优捕捞
28732.abstract: The literature on the optimal harvest of fisheries has concentrated on a single fishing area with biomass uncertainty and to a lesser degree also with price uncertainty. We develop and implement a stochastic optimal control approach to determine the harvest that maximizes the value of a fishery participating in a global market, where all the considered harvesting zones sell their production. This market is characterized by an inverse demand function, which combines an exogenous demand shock and the aggregate harvesting of all zones. Accordingly, a fishery's harvest will be affected by the global demand shocks and the harvesting in all the competing zones through the global selling price. In addition, we decompose the biomass uncertainty into local and global biomass shocks. Through global biomass shocks, the model provides enough flexibility to acknowledge for correlation in the biomass shocks faced by the multiple perhaps adjacent areas. When we compare our global framework with an alternative where the individual zones are aggregated into a single optimizing fishery we find that competition will increase the global harvest and consequently reduced the resource price.
28732.zh_abstract: 关于渔业最优捕捞的文献主要集中在单一渔区，并考虑了生物量不确定性，在较小程度上也考虑了价格不确定性。我们开发并实施了一种随机最优控制方法，以确定使参与全球市场的渔业价值最大化的捕捞量，其中所有考虑的渔区都在该市场销售其产品。该市场以逆需求函数为特征，该函数结合了外生需求冲击和所有渔区的总捕捞量。因此，一个渔区的捕捞量将受到全球需求冲击以及所有竞争渔区通过全球销售价格产生的捕捞量的影响。此外，我们将生物量不确定性分解为局部和全球生物量冲击。通过全球生物量冲击，该模型提供了足够的灵活性来承认多个可能相邻区域所面临的生物量冲击之间的相关性。当我们将我们的全球框架与另一种将各个渔区合并为一个单一优化渔业的替代方案进行比较时，我们发现竞争将增加全球捕捞量，从而降低资源价格。
28732.meta: Programs：AP, EEE；JEL：G10, G13, G31, Q20, Q22

28731.title: Why Working from Home Will Stick
28731.zh_title: 为何居家办公将长期存在
28731.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
28731.abstract: COVID-19 drove a mass social experiment in working from home (WFH). We survey more than 30,000 Americans over multiple waves to investigate whether WFH will stick, and why. Our data say that 20 percent of full workdays will be supplied from home after the pandemic ends, compared with just 5 percent before. We develop evidence on five reasons for this large shift: better-than-expected WFH experiences, new investments in physical and human capital that enable WFH, greatly diminished stigma associated with WFH, lingering concerns about crowds and contagion risks, and a pandemic-driven surge in technological innovations that support WFH. We also use our survey data to project three consequences: First, employees will enjoy large benefits from greater remote work, especially those with higher earnings. Second, the shift to WFH will directly reduce spending in major city centers by at least 5-10 percent relative to the pre-pandemic situation. Third, our data on employer plans and the relative productivity of WFH imply a 5 percent productivity boost in the post-pandemic economy due to re-optimized working arrangements. Only one-fifth of this productivity gain will show up in conventional productivity measures, because they do not capture the time savings from less commuting.
28731.zh_abstract: COVID-19 推动了一场关于居家办公的大规模社会实验。我们通过多轮调查访问了超过 30,000 名美国人，以研究居家办公是否会持续存在及其原因。我们的数据显示，疫情结束后，20% 的完整工作日将来自居家办公，而疫情前这一比例仅为 5%。我们提供了关于这一巨大转变的五个原因的证据：居家办公体验好于预期、支持居家办公的实物和人力资本新投资、与居家办公相关的污名化大幅减少、对人群聚集和传染风险的持续担忧，以及疫情推动的支持居家办公的技术创新激增。我们还利用调查数据预测了三个后果：首先，员工将从更多的远程工作中获得巨大收益，尤其是收入较高的员工。其次，转向居家办公将直接导致主要城市中心的支出相对于疫情前水平至少减少 5-10%。第三，我们关于雇主计划和居家办公相对生产率的数据表明，由于工作安排的重新优化，疫情后经济的生产率将提升 5%。这些生产率提升中只有五分之一会体现在传统的生产率指标中，因为这些指标并未捕捉到通勤时间减少所带来的节省。
28731.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：D13, D23, E24, G18, J22, M54, R3

28730.title: Myopic Loss Aversion and Investment Decisions: from the Laboratory to the Field
28730.zh_title: 短视损失厌恶与投资决策：从实验室到现实市场
28730.authors: Kazi Iqbal, Asadul Islam, John A. List, Vy Nguyen
28730.abstract: Whether, and to what extent, behavioral anomalies uncovered in the lab manifest themselves in the field remains of first order importance in finance and economics. We begin by examining behavior of retail traders/investors making investment decisions in constructed laboratory markets. Our results show that the behaviors of the traders are consistent with myopic loss aversion. We combine the lab results with a unique individual-level matched dataset on daily stock market transactions and portfolio positions over a two year period. We find that lab behaviors help to predict, but do not fully capture, the essential real-world trading analogs of retail traders.
28730.zh_abstract: 在实验室中发现的行为异常是否以及在多大程度上会在现实市场中显现，这仍然是金融和经济学中首要重要的问题。我们首先考察了在构建的实验室市场中做出投资决策的散户交易者/投资者的行为。我们的结果表明，交易者的行为与短视损失厌恶一致。我们将实验室结果与一个独特的、为期两年的个人层面每日股票市场交易和投资组合头寸的匹配数据集相结合。我们发现，实验室行为有助于预测，但不能完全捕捉散户交易者在现实世界中的基本交易行为。
28730.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, PE；JEL：C9, C93, D03, N97

28729.title: Strategic Fragmented Markets
28729.abstract: We study the determinants of asset market fragmentation in a model with strategic investors that disagree about the value of an asset. Investors' choices determine the market structure. Fragmented markets are supported in equilibrium when disagreement between investors is low. In this case, investors take the same side of the market and are willing to trade in smaller markets with a higher price impact to face less competition when trading against a dealer. The maximum degree of market fragmentation increases as investors' priors are more correlated. Dealers can benefit from fragmentation, but investors are always better off in centralized markets.
28729.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含对资产价值存在分歧的战略性投资者的模型中，研究资产市场碎片化的决定因素。投资者的选择决定了市场结构。当投资者之间的分歧较低时，碎片化市场在均衡中得到支持。在这种情况下，投资者站在市场的同一侧，并愿意在价格影响更大的较小市场中交易，以便在与交易商交易时面临更少的竞争。市场碎片化的最大程度随着投资者先验信念的相关性增加而增加。交易商可以从碎片化中受益，但投资者在集中市场中总是过得更好。

28728.title: On the Welfare Gains from Tradeable Benefits-in-Kind
28728.zh_title: 可交易实物福利的福利收益
28728.abstract: Governments often prohibit resale of the benefits-in-kind provided by antipoverty programs. Yet the personal gains from those benefits are likely to vary and to be known privately, so there can be gains to poor people from trading their assignments. We know very little about those gains. To help address this knowledge gap, the paper models a competitive market for assignments, and simulates the market using an unusual survey of workers on a rural public-works scheme in a poor state of India. The results indicate large gains from tradeable assignments after first randomizing. The gains exceed those from poverty targeting without trade and are not lower for poorer households or female workers. Fully realizing the gains from trade in practice may require complementary policies to help people access the market and to support its administration and regulation.
28728.zh_abstract: 政府通常禁止转售反贫困计划提供的实物福利。然而，这些福利的个人收益可能因人而异且为私人信息，因此穷人之间通过交易其配额可能获得收益。我们对这些收益知之甚少。为帮助填补这一知识空白，本文建立了一个配额竞争市场模型，并利用一项针对印度贫困邦农村公共工程计划工人的特殊调查进行市场模拟。结果表明，在初始随机分配后，可交易配额带来了巨大的收益。这些收益超过了没有交易时的贫困瞄准收益，并且对于较贫困家庭或女性工人而言并未降低。在实践中充分实现交易收益可能需要配套政策，以帮助人们进入市场并支持其行政管理和监管。

28727.title: Does Mentoring Increase the Collaboration Networks of Female Economists? An Evaluation of the CeMENT Randomized Trial
28727.zh_title: 导师制能否扩大女性经济学家的合作网络？对 CeMENT 随机试验的评估
28727.abstract: Previous research has shown that women in the treatment group of the CeMENT randomized controlled trial increased their publications and the likelihood that they were tenured in top 50 economics departments. This paper examines one potential mechanism, namely, that CeMENT expanded the collaboration networks of the participants. Our analysis finds that women who received the mentoring treatment had three additional pre-tenure coauthors, 1.6 more pre-tenure publications and 43 additional citations to those publications. After controlling for additional coauthors, the CeMENT program increased publications, and top-tier publications. These results suggest that the information conveyed at the workshop facilitated participants’ career success.
28727.zh_abstract: 先前的研究表明，在 CeMENT 随机对照试验中，接受处理组的女性其发表物数量以及在排名前 50 的经济学系获得终身教职的可能性均有所增加。本文考察了一个潜在的机制，即 CeMENT 扩大了参与者的合作网络。我们的分析发现，接受导师制处理的女性在获得终身教职前平均多了 3 位合著者，多了 1.6 篇发表物，并且这些发表物被多引用了 43 次。在控制了额外合著者后，CeMENT 项目增加了发表物数量和顶级期刊发表物。这些结果表明，研讨会上传达的信息促进了参与者的职业成功。

28726.title: Selecting the Most Effective Nudge: Evidence from a Large-Scale Experiment on Immunization
28726.zh_title: 选择最有效的助推：来自大规模免疫实验的证据
28726.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Suresh Dalpath, Esther Duflo, John Floretta, Matthew O. Jackson, Harini Kannan, Francine N. Loza, Anirudh Sankar, Anna Schrimpf, Maheshwor Shrestha
28726.abstract: Policymakers often choose a policy bundle that is a combination of different interventions in different dosages. We develop a new technique—treatment variant aggregation (TVA)—to select a policy from a large factorial design. TVA pools together policy variants that are not meaningfully different and prunes those deemed ineffective. This allows us to restrict attention to aggregated policy variants, consistently estimate their effects on the outcome, and estimate the best policy effect adjusting for the winner’s curse. We apply TVA to a large randomized controlled trial that tests interventions to stimulate demand for immunization in Haryana, India. The policies under consideration include reminders, incentives, and local ambassadors for community mobilization. Cross-randomizing these interventions, with different dosages or types of each intervention, yields 75 combinations. The policy with the largest impact (which combines incentives, ambassadors who are information hubs, and reminders) increases the number of immunizations by 44% relative to the status quo. The most cost-effective policy (information hubs, ambassadors, and SMS reminders but no incentives) increases the number of immunizations per dollar by 9.1% relative to status quo.
28726.zh_abstract: 政策制定者通常选择由不同干预措施以不同剂量组合而成的政策包。我们开发了一种新技术——处理变体聚合——来从大规模析因设计中筛选政策。TVA 将没有显著差异的政策变体合并，并剔除被认为无效的变体。这使我们能够将注意力集中在聚合后的政策变体上，一致地估计它们对结果的影响，并在调整赢家诅咒后估计最佳政策效果。我们将 TVA 应用于一项大规模随机对照试验，该试验测试了刺激印度哈里亚纳邦免疫需求的干预措施。所考虑的政策包括提醒、激励措施和社区动员的地方大使。交叉随机化这些干预措施，每种干预措施采用不同剂量或类型，共产生 75 种组合。影响最大的政策（结合了激励措施、作为信息枢纽的大使和提醒）使免疫接种数量相对于现状增加了 44%。最具成本效益的政策（信息枢纽、大使和短信提醒，但无激励措施）使每美元免疫接种数量相对于现状增加了 9.1%。
28726.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, DEV, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C18, C93, D83, I15, O12, O15

28725.title: Disability Insurance in the Great Recession: Ease of Access, Program Enrollment, and Local Hysteresis
28725.zh_title: 大衰退中的残疾保险：准入便利性、项目注册与局部滞后效应
28725.authors: Melissa S. Kearney, Brendan M. Price, Riley Wilson
28725.abstract: Previous research has documented that Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) applications and awards increase during economic downturns and that expanded access to SSDI leads to a reduction in employment. We build on these insights and investigate to what extent differential access to SSDI during economic downturns leads to differential changes in SSDI enrollment and employment during the subsequent recovery. We exploit plausibly exogenous variation in SSDI appeals processing time (a measure of hassle or access) facing individuals living in ZIP codes that straddle Social Security Administration hearing office catchment borders. During the Great Recession, ZIP codes assigned to hearing offices with faster appellate processes saw a larger increase in SSDI enrollment than their cross-border neighbors. These enrollment effects are concentrated among ZIP code pairs that experienced more severe labor market downturns, and they persist as late as 2015. In the full sample, there is no clear effect of longer processing times on subsequent employment rates. However, we find some limited evidence that faster appellate processes may have weighed on the employment recovery in hard-hit ZIP codes that had high pre-recession rates of SSDI enrollment. Our findings highlight the importance of considering interaction effects between economic shocks and ease of access to the safety net.
28725.zh_abstract: 先前的研究已证实，社会保障残疾保险的申请和授予在经济衰退期间会增加，并且扩大 SSDI 的准入会导致就业减少。我们基于这些见解，研究经济衰退期间 SSDI 准入的差异在多大程度上导致随后复苏期间 SSDI 注册和就业的差异变化。我们利用了居住在跨越社会保障局听证办公室辖区边界的邮政编码区的个人所面临的 SSDI 上诉处理时间（一种衡量麻烦或准入程度的指标）中看似外生的变化。在大衰退期间，被分配到上诉流程更快的听证办公室的邮政编码区，其 SSDI 注册人数的增长幅度大于其跨境邻居。这些注册效应集中在经历了更严重劳动力市场衰退的邮政编码区对中，并且持续到 2015 年。在全样本中，更长的处理时间对后续就业率没有明显影响。然而，我们发现了有限的证据表明，在那些经济衰退前 SSDI 注册率较高且遭受重创的邮政编码区，更快的上诉流程可能抑制了就业复苏。我们的研究结果强调了考虑经济冲击与安全网准入便利性之间交互效应的重要性。

28724.title: Digital Collateral
28724.authors: Paul Gertler, Brett Green, Catherine Wolfram
28724.abstract: A new form of secured lending using “digital collateral” has recently emerged, most prominently in low- and middle-income countries. Digital collateral relies on lockout technology, which allows the lender to temporarily disable the flow value of the collateral to the borrower without physically repossessing it. We explore this new form of credit both in a model and in a field experiment using school-fee loans digitally secured with a solar home system. Securing a loan with digital collateral drastically reduces default rates (by 19 pp) and increases the lender’s rate of return (by 38 pp). Employing a variant of the Karlan and Zinman (2009) methodology, we decompose the total effect on repayment and find that roughly one-third is attributable to adverse selection, and two-thirds is attributable to moral hazard. In addition, access to digitally secured school-fee loans significantly increases school enrollment and school-related expenditures without detrimental effects to households’ balance sheet.
28724.zh_abstract: 一种使用“数字抵押品”的新型担保贷款最近出现，主要在中低收入国家。数字抵押品依赖于锁定技术，该技术允许贷款人暂时禁用抵押品对借款人的流动价值，而无需实际收回抵押品。我们通过一个模型和一个实地实验来探索这种新的信贷形式，该实验使用以太阳能家庭系统进行数字担保的学费贷款。用数字抵押品担保贷款大幅降低了违约率（降低了19个百分点），并提高了贷款人的回报率（提高了38个百分点）。采用Karlan和Zinman（2009）方法的一个变体，我们分解了对还款的总影响，发现大约三分之一可归因于逆向选择，三分之二可归因于道德风险。此外，获得数字担保的学费贷款显著提高了入学率和与学校相关的支出，而对家庭资产负债表没有不利影响。

28723.title: Fearless Woman: Financial Literacy and Stock Market Participation
28723.zh_title: 无畏的女性：金融素养与股市参与
28723.authors: Tabea Bucher-Koenen, Rob J. Alessie, Annamaria Lusardi, Maarten van Rooij
28723.abstract: Women are less financially literate than men. It is unclear whether this gap reflects a lack of knowledge or, rather, a lack of confidence. Our survey experiment shows that women tend to disproportionately respond “do not know” to questions measuring financial knowledge, but when this response option is unavailable, they often choose the correct answer. We estimate a latent class model and predict the probability that respondents truly know the correct answers. We find that about one-third of the financial literacy gender gap can be explained by women’s lower confidence levels. Both financial knowledge and confidence explain stock market participation.
28723.zh_abstract: 女性的金融素养低于男性。尚不清楚这种差距是反映了知识缺乏，还是信心不足。我们的调查实验表明，女性倾向于不成比例地回答“不知道”来衡量金融知识的问题，但当这个回答选项不可用时，她们通常选择正确答案。我们估计了一个潜在类别模型，并预测受访者真正知道正确答案的概率。我们发现，大约三分之一的金融素养性别差距可以用女性较低的自信心水平来解释。金融知识和信心都能解释股市参与。

28785.title: Air Pollution and Adult Cognition: Evidence from Brain Training
28785.zh_title: 空气污染与成人认知：来自大脑训练的证据
28785.authors: Andrea La Nauze, Edson R. Severnini
28785.abstract: We exploit novel data from brain-training games to examine the impacts of air pollution on a comprehensive set of cognitive skills in adults. We find that exposure to particulate matter (PM2.5) impairs adult cognitive function, and that these effects are largest for those in prime working age. These results confirm a hypothesized mechanism for the impacts of air pollution on workforce productivity. We also find that the cognitive effects are largest for new tasks and for those with low ability, suggesting that air pollution increases inequality in productivity.
28785.zh_abstract: 我们利用大脑训练游戏的新颖数据，研究了空气污染对成年人一系列综合认知技能的影响。我们发现，暴露于细颗粒物（PM2.5）会损害成年人的认知功能，且这种影响对处于主要工作年龄的人群最为显著。这些结果证实了空气污染影响劳动力生产率的一个假设机制。我们还发现，认知影响对于新任务和能力较低的人群最为显著，这表明空气污染加剧了生产率的不平等。
28785.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, LS；JEL：I14, I24, J24, Q53

28784.title: Temporal Instability of Risk Preference among the Poor: Evidence from Payday Cycles
28784.zh_title: 贫困人口风险偏好的时间不稳定性：来自发薪日周期的证据
28784.authors: Mika Akesaka, Peter Eibich, Chie Hanaoka, Hitoshi Shigeoka
28784.abstract: The poor live paycheck to paycheck and are repeatedly exposed to strong cyclical income fluctuations. We investigate whether such income fluctuations affect risk preference among the poor. If risk preference temporarily changes around payday, optimal decisions made before payday may no longer be optimal afterward, which could reinforce poverty. By exploiting Social Security payday cycles in the US, we find that risk preference among the poor relying heavily on Social Security changes around payday. Rather than cognitive decline before payday, the deterioration of mental health and relative deprivation may play a role. We find similar evidence among the Japanese elderly.
28784.zh_abstract: 贫困人口靠薪水度日，反复面临强烈的周期性收入波动。我们研究了这种收入波动是否会影响贫困人口的风险偏好。如果风险偏好在发薪日前后暂时发生变化，那么发薪日前做出的最优决策在发薪日后可能不再最优，这可能会加剧贫困。通过利用美国社会保障发薪日周期，我们发现严重依赖社会保障的贫困人口的风险偏好在发薪日前后发生变化。心理健康恶化和相对剥夺感可能在其中起作用，而非发薪日前的认知衰退。我们在日本老年人中也发现了类似的证据。

28783.title: Time is of the Essence: Climate Adaptation Induced by Existing Institutions
28783.zh_title: 时间至关重要：现有制度引发的气候适应
28783.authors: Antonio Bento, Noah S. Miller, Mehreen Mookerjee, Edson R. Severnini
28783.abstract: This study conceptualizes and demonstrates empirically that existing non-climate policies can induce climate adaptation. Adaptation involves adjusting to or coping with climatic change with the goal of reducing our vulnerability to its harmful effects. We examine the impact of temperature on ambient ozone concentration in the United States from 1980-2013. Ozone is formed under warm temperatures, but regulated by the Clean Air Act. These air quality standards may act as a buffer against extreme increases in ambient ozone concentration. Indeed, adaptation in counties out of attainment with the standards is 107 percent larger than under attainment, implying substantial regulation-induced adaptation.
28783.zh_abstract: 本研究概念化并实证证明了现有的非气候政策可以引发气候适应。适应涉及调整或应对气候变化，目标是减少我们对其有害影响的脆弱性。我们考察了1980年至2013年间温度对美国环境臭氧浓度的影响。臭氧在温暖温度下形成，但受到《清洁空气法》的监管。这些空气质量标准可能起到缓冲作用，防止环境臭氧浓度极端升高。事实上，未达标县的适应效应比达标县高出107%，这表明存在显著的监管引发的适应。
28783.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：D02, H23, K32, P48, Q53, Q54, Q58

28782.title: The Long-Run Spillover Effects of Pollution: How Exposure to Lead Affects Everyone in the Classroom
28782.zh_title: 污染的长期溢出效应：铅暴露如何影响课堂中的每个人
28782.authors: Ludovica Gazze, Claudia Persico, Sandra Spirovska
28782.abstract: Children exposed to pollutants like lead are more disruptive and have lower achievement. However, little is known about whether lead-exposed children affect the long-run outcomes of their peers. We estimate these spillover effects using new data on preschool blood lead levels (BLLs) matched to education data for all students in North Carolina public schools. We compare siblings whose school-grade cohorts differ in the proportion of children with elevated BLLs, holding constant school and peers’ demographics. Having more lead-exposed peers is associated with lower high-school graduation and SAT-taking rates and increased suspensions and absences. Peer effects are larger for same-gendered students.
28782.zh_abstract: 接触铅等污染物的儿童更具破坏性，学业成绩也更低。然而，关于铅暴露儿童是否会影响其同龄人的长期结果，我们知之甚少。我们利用北卡罗来纳州公立学校所有学生的学龄前血铅水平新数据，并将其与教育数据匹配，来估计这些溢出效应。我们比较了兄弟姐妹中，其学校年级队列中血铅水平升高儿童比例不同的情况，同时控制了学校和同龄人的人口统计学特征。拥有更多铅暴露同龄人的学生，其高中毕业率和SAT参加率较低，而停学和缺勤率较高。同龄人效应在同性别学生中更大。

28781.title: Mortgage Lenders and the Geographic Concentration of Foreclosures
28781.zh_title: 抵押贷款机构与止赎的地理集中
28781.abstract: We use HMDA rate spread loans to identify lenders involved in riskier lending prior to the foreclosure crisis. We develop a shift-share measure of changes in high rate spread share lender representation in housing submarkets across origination years. While half the cross-sectional correlation between foreclosure and high rate spread lender share is explained by borrower observables, we find robust and stable estimates of the within housing submarket relationship between foreclosure and predicted changes in market share. Estimates are not explained by local housing price variation, rather evidence suggests servicer behavior in response to rising local foreclosure rates as a mechanism.
