28781.zh_abstract: 我们利用HMDA利差贷款数据来识别在止赎危机前参与高风险贷款的机构。我们开发了一个基于份额转移的衡量指标，用于衡量在贷款发放年份中，住房子市场中高利差份额贷款机构代表性的变化。虽然止赎率与高利差贷款机构份额之间的横截面相关性有一半可由借款人可观测特征解释，但我们发现，在住房子市场内部，止赎率与预测的市场份额变化之间的关系具有稳健且稳定的估计值。这些估计值无法由当地房价变动解释，相反，证据表明，服务商对当地止赎率上升的反应是一种作用机制。
28781.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, PE；JEL：D14, G01, G21, R21, R23

28780.title: Augmenting State Capacity for Child Development: Experimental Evidence from India
28780.zh_title: 增强儿童发展中的国家能力：来自印度的实验证据
28780.authors: Alejandro J. Ganimian, Karthik Muralidharan, Christopher R. Walters
28780.abstract: We use a large-scale randomized experiment to study the impact of augmenting staffing in the world’s largest public early childhood program: India’s Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS). Adding a half-time worker doubled net preschool instructional time and led to 0.29σ and 0.46σ increases in math and language test scores after 18 months for children who remained enrolled in the program. Rates of stunting and severe malnutrition were also lower in the treatment group. A cost-benefit analysis suggests that the benefits of augmenting ICDS staffing are likely to significantly exceed its costs even under conservative assumptions.
28780.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项大规模随机实验，研究了在全球最大的公共儿童早期项目——印度综合儿童发展服务（ICDS）中增加人员配置的影响。增加一名半职工作人员使学前教学净时间翻倍，并在18个月后使继续参与该项目的儿童的数学和语言测试成绩分别提高了0.29个标准差和0.46个标准差。治疗组的发育迟缓和严重营养不良率也较低。成本效益分析表明，即使在保守假设下，增强ICDS人员配置的收益也可能显著超过其成本。
28780.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C93, I21, I22, I25, O15

28779.title: Should There Be Vertical Choice in Health Insurance Markets?
28779.zh_title: 健康保险市场是否应存在垂直选择？
28779.abstract: We study the welfare effects of offering choice over coverage levels—“vertical choice”—in regulated health insurance markets. We emphasize that heterogeneity in the efficient level of coverage is not sufficient to motivate choice. When premiums do not reflect individuals' costs, it may not be in consumers' best interest to select their efficient coverage level. We show that vertical choice is efficient only if consumers with higher willingness to pay for insurance have a higher efficient level of coverage. We investigate this condition empirically and find that as long as a minimum coverage level can be enforced, the welfare gains from vertical choice are either zero or economically small.
28779.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在受监管的健康保险市场中提供覆盖水平选择（即“垂直选择”）的福利效应。我们强调，有效覆盖水平的异质性并不足以成为提供选择的理由。当保费不反映个人成本时，消费者选择其有效覆盖水平可能并不符合自身最佳利益。我们证明，只有当对保险支付意愿较高的消费者具有较高的有效覆盖水平时，垂直选择才是有效的。我们通过实证检验了这一条件，并发现只要能够强制执行最低覆盖水平，垂直选择带来的福利收益要么为零，要么在经济上微不足道。

28778.title: Do Firms with Specialized M&A Staff Make Better Acquisitions?
28778.zh_title: 拥有专业并购人员的公司能做出更好的收购吗？
28778.authors: Sinan Gokkaya, Xi Liu, René M. Stulz
28778.abstract: We open the black box of the M&A decision process by constructing a comprehensive sample of US firms with specialized M&A staff. We investigate whether specialized M&A staff improves acquisition performance or facilitates managerial empire building instead. We find that firms with specialized M&A staff make better acquisitions when acquisition performance is measured by stock price reactions to announcements, long-run stock returns, operating performance, divestitures, and analyst earnings forecasts. This effect does not hold when the CEO is powerful, overconfident, or entrenched. Acquisitions by firms without specialized staff do not create value, on average. We provide evidence on mechanisms through which specialized M&A staff improves acquisition performance. For identification, we use the staggered recognition of inevitable disclosure doctrine as a source of exogenous variation in the employment of specialized M&A staff.
28778.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个拥有专业并购人员的美国公司综合样本，打开了并购决策过程的黑箱。我们研究了专业并购人员是提高了收购绩效，还是反而助长了管理层的帝国构建。我们发现，当收购绩效通过公告股价反应、长期股票回报、经营业绩、资产剥离和分析师盈利预测来衡量时，拥有专业并购人员的公司能做出更好的收购。当CEO权力过大、过度自信或固守职位时，这种效应不成立。平均而言，没有专业人员的公司进行的收购并未创造价值。我们提供了专业并购人员改善收购绩效的机制证据。为了进行识别，我们利用了不可避免披露原则的分阶段认可作为专业并购人员雇佣的外生变化来源。

28777.title: CIP Deviations, the Dollar, and Frictions in International Capital Markets
28777.zh_title: CIP偏差、美元与国际资本市场摩擦
28777.abstract: The covered interest rate parity (CIP) condition is a fundamental arbitrage relationship in international finance. In this chapter, we review its breakdown during the Global Financial Crisis and its continued failure in the subsequent decade. We review how to measure CIP deviations, discuss the drivers of CIP deviations, and the implications of CIP deviations for global financial markets.
28777.zh_abstract: 覆盖利率平价（CIP）条件是国际金融中的基本套利关系。在本章中，我们回顾了其在全球金融危机期间的崩溃以及随后十年中的持续失效。我们探讨了如何衡量CIP偏差，讨论了CIP偏差的驱动因素，以及CIP偏差对全球金融市场的影响。
28777.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E0, F0, G0

28776.title: Household Debt Overhang Did Hardly Cause a Larger Spending Fall during the Financial Crisis in Australia
28776.zh_title: 澳大利亚金融危机期间，家庭债务积压几乎未导致更大的支出下降
28776.abstract: The “debt-overhang hypothesis” – that households cut back more on their spending in a crisis when they have higher levels of outstanding mortgage debt (Dynan, 2012) – seems to be taken for granted by macroprudential authorities in several countries in their policy decisions, as well as by the international organizations that evaluate and comment on countries’ macroprudential policy. New results for Australian microdata are presented that reject the debt-overhang hypothesis. The results instead support the “spending-normalization hypothesis” of Andersen, Duus, and Jensen (2016), what can also be called the “debt-financed overspending” hypothesis – that the correlation between high pre-crisis household indebtedness and subsequent spending falls during the crisis reflects high debt-financed spending pre-crisis and a return to normal spending during the crisis. As discussed in Svensson (2019, 2020), this is consistent with the above correlation reflecting debt-financed overspending through what Muellbauer (2012) calls the “housing-collateral household demand” channel and Mian and Sufi (2018) the “credit-driven household demand” channel.
28776.zh_abstract: “债务积压假说”——即危机期间，当家庭未偿还抵押贷款债务水平较高时，他们会更大幅度地削减支出（Dynan, 2012）——似乎被多个国家的宏观审慎当局在其政策决策中，以及评估和评论各国宏观审慎政策的国际组织视为理所当然。我们提出的澳大利亚微观数据新结果否定了债务积压假说。这些结果反而支持了Andersen、Duus和Jensen（2016）的“支出正常化假说”，也可称为“债务融资过度支出假说”——即危机前高家庭债务与危机期间随后的支出下降之间的相关性，反映了危机前由债务融资的高支出以及危机期间支出回归正常水平。正如Svensson（2019, 2020）所讨论的，这与上述相关性反映了通过Muellbauer（2012）所称的“住房抵押家庭需求”渠道以及Mian和Sufi（2018）所称的“信贷驱动家庭需求”渠道进行的债务融资过度支出是一致的。
28776.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, G01, G18, G21, R21

28775.title: Tax Planning Knowledge Diffusion via the Labor Market
28775.zh_title: 通过劳动力市场扩散的税收筹划知识
28775.abstract: We examine the extent to which the labor market facilitates the diffusion of tax planning knowledge across firms. Using a novel dataset of tax department employee movements between S&P 1500 firms, we find that firms experience an increase in their tax planning after hiring a tax employee from a tax aggressive firm. This finding is robust to various research designs and specifications. Consistent with tax planning knowledge driving this result, we find that the tax planning benefit of hiring an employee from a tax aggressive firm is stronger when the employee has more tax experience and is hired into a senior tax department role, and when the hiring firm likely had less tax planning knowledge prior to the hire. Further tests suggest that tax planning knowledge is highly specific in nature: the increase in tax avoidance is larger when the hiring and former firms are similar (i.e., operating in the same sector or having similar foreign operations), and firms are more likely to hire tax department employees from firms with similar characteristics. Our study documents the first-order role of the labor market in the diffusion of tax planning knowledge across firms, and suggests that tax department human capital is a central determinant of tax planning outcomes.
28775.zh_abstract: 我们研究了劳动力市场在多大程度上促进了税收筹划知识在企业间的扩散。利用一个包含S&P 1500公司税务部门员工流动的新数据集，我们发现，公司在从税收激进公司雇佣一名税务员工后，其税收筹划活动有所增加。这一发现在各种研究设计和规格下都是稳健的。与税收筹划知识驱动这一结果相一致的是，我们发现，当该员工拥有更多税务经验并被聘用到高级税务部门职位，以及当雇佣公司在雇佣前可能拥有较少税收筹划知识时，从税收激进公司雇佣员工带来的税收筹划收益更强。进一步的测试表明，税收筹划知识具有高度特定性：当雇佣公司和前公司相似（即在同一行业运营或具有相似的海外业务）时，避税程度的增加更大，并且公司更倾向于从具有相似特征的公司雇佣税务部门员工。我们的研究记录了劳动力市场在企业间扩散税收筹划知识中的首要作用，并表明税务部门的人力资本是税收筹划结果的核心决定因素。
28775.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PE；JEL：H25, H26, J20, J24, J4, J44, J60

28774.title: The Battle Over Patents: History and the Politics of Innovation
28774.zh_title: 专利之争：历史与创新政治学
28774.authors: Stephen H. Haber, Naomi R. Lamoreaux
28774.abstract: This essay is the introduction to a book of the same title, forthcoming in summer of 2021 from Oxford University Press. The purpose is to document the ways in which patent systems are products of battles over the economic surplus from innovation. The features of these systems take shape as interests at different points in the production chain seek advantage in any way they can, and consequently, they are riven with imperfections. The interesting historical question is why US-style patent systems with all their imperfections have come to dominate other methods of encouraging inventive activity. The essays in the book suggest that the creation of a tradable but temporary property right facilitates the transfer of technological knowledge and thus fosters a highly productive decentralized ecology of inventors and firms.
28774.zh_abstract: 本文是一本同名书籍的引言，该书将于2021年夏季由牛津大学出版社出版。其目的是记录专利制度是如何成为围绕创新经济剩余进行斗争的产物。这些制度的特征随着生产链不同环节的利益相关者以各种方式寻求优势而形成，因此，它们充满了缺陷。一个有趣的历史问题是，为什么美国式的专利制度尽管存在所有缺陷，却已主导了其他鼓励发明活动的方法。本书中的文章表明，可交易但临时的财产权的创造促进了技术知识的转移，从而培育了一个由发明者和公司组成的高效分散化生态系统。
28774.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：N4, N41, N42, N43, N44, O3, O34

28773.title: Getting Schooled: The Role of Universities in Attracting Immigrant Entrepreneurs
28773.zh_title: 接受教育：大学在吸引移民企业家中的作用
28773.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Paul A. Gompers, George Hu, Kaushik Vasudevan
28773.abstract: Immigrant founders of venture capital-backed companies have been critical to the entrepreneurial ecosystem. We document the channels through which immigrant founders find their way to the United States and how those channels have changed over time. Immigrants have been an important source of founders for venture capital-backed startups accounting for roughly 20% of all founders over the past 30 years. Immigrants coming to the United States for their education have been the primary source of founders with those coming after being educated abroad and then arriving for work decreasing in importance over time. The importance of undergraduate education as a channel for immigrant founders has increased over time. Immigrant founders coming for education are likely to start their companies in the state in which they were educated, especially states where they received their graduate education, leading to potentially large local economic benefits. The results of this paper have important policy implications for the supply of entrepreneurial talent and efforts to promote entrepreneurial ecosystems.
28773.zh_abstract: 风险投资支持公司的移民创始人对创业生态系统至关重要。我们记录了移民创始人进入美国的渠道以及这些渠道随时间的变化。移民一直是风险投资支持初创企业创始人的重要来源，在过去30年中约占所有创始人的20%。来美国接受教育的移民一直是创始人的主要来源，而在国外接受教育后为工作而来美国的创始人的重要性随时间推移而下降。本科教育作为移民创始人渠道的重要性随时间增加。为教育而来的移民创始人很可能在他们接受教育的州创办公司，尤其是在他们接受研究生教育的州，这可能会带来巨大的地方经济利益。本文的结果对创业人才的供给以及促进创业生态系统的努力具有重要的政策意义。
28773.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：G24, J0, J15, J24, L26

28772.title: Productivity, Place, and Plants
28772.abstract: Why do cities differ so much in productivity? A long literature has sought out systematic sources, such as inherent productivity advantages, market access, agglomeration forces, or sorting. We document that up to three quarters of the measured regional productivity dispersion is spurious, reflecting the “luck of the draw” of finite counts of idiosyncratically heterogeneous plants that happen to operate in a given location. The patterns are even more pronounced for new plants, hold for alternative productivity measures, and broadly extend to European countries. This large role for individual plants suggests a smaller role for places in driving regional differences.
28772.zh_abstract: 为什么城市之间的生产率差异如此之大？长期以来，文献一直在寻找系统性的原因，例如固有的生产率优势、市场准入、集聚力量或分类效应。我们证明，高达四分之三的观测到的区域生产率差异是虚假的，反映了“抽签运气”——即恰好在一个特定地点运营的、数量有限的、具有异质性的工厂。这种模式对于新工厂而言更为明显，对于其他生产率衡量指标也成立，并且广泛适用于欧洲国家。单个工厂的巨大作用表明，地点在驱动区域差异方面的作用较小。
28772.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D22, D24, E23, R0, R12

28771.title: A Congestion Theory of Unemployment Fluctuations
28771.authors: Yusuf Mercan, Benjamin Schoefer, Petr Sedláček
28771.abstract: We propose a theory of unemployment fluctuations in which new-hires and incumbent-workers are imperfect substitutes. Hence, attempts to hire away the unemployed during recessions diminish the marginal product of new hires, discouraging job creation. This single feature achieves a ten-fold increase in the volatility of hiring in an otherwise standard search model, produces a realistic Beveridge curve despite countercyclical separations, and explains 30–40% of US unemployment fluctuations. Additionally, it explains the excess procyclicality of new hires’ wages, the cyclical labor wedge, countercyclical earnings losses from job displacement, and the limited steady-state effects of unemployment insurance.
28771.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种失业波动理论，其中新雇佣工人和在职工人是不完全替代的。因此，在经济衰退期间试图雇佣失业者的行为会降低新雇佣工人的边际产出，从而抑制就业创造。这一单一特征在原本标准的搜索模型中实现了招聘波动性的十倍增长，尽管存在逆周期的离职率，但仍能产生现实的贝弗里奇曲线，并解释了美国30-40%的失业波动。此外，它还解释了新雇佣工人工资的过度顺周期性、周期性劳动楔子、失业导致的逆周期收入损失，以及失业保险有限的稳态效应。
28771.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PR；JEL：D24, E24, E32, J21, J23, J64

28770.title: Reservation Raises: The Aggregate Labor Supply Curve at the Extensive Margin
28770.zh_title: 保留加薪：广义边际上的总劳动供给曲线
28770.abstract: We measure extensive-margin labor supply (employment) preferences in two representative surveys of the U.S. and German populations. We elicit reservation raises: the percent wage change that renders a given individual indifferent between employment and nonemployment. It is equal to her reservation wage divided by her actual, or potential, wage. The reservation raise distribution is the nonparametric aggregate labor supply curve. Locally, the curve exhibits large short-run elasticities above 3, consistent with business cycle evidence. For larger upward shifts, arc elasticities shrink towards 0.5, consistent with quasi-experimental evidence from tax holidays. Existing models fail to match this nonconstant, asymmetric curve.
28770.zh_abstract: 我们在两项具有代表性的美国与德国人口调查中衡量了广义边际劳动供给（就业）偏好。我们引出了“保留加薪”：即使特定个体在就业与非就业之间无差异的工资变化百分比。它等于该个体的保留工资除以其实际或潜在工资。保留加薪的分布构成了非参数的总劳动供给曲线。在局部，该曲线表现出大于3的较大短期弹性，这与商业周期的证据一致。对于较大的向上变动，弧弹性缩小至0.5左右，这与来自税收假期准实验研究的证据一致。现有模型无法匹配这种非恒定、非对称的曲线。
28770.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E24, E32, J22, J64

28769.title: Invention and the Life Course: Age Differences in Patenting
28769.zh_title: 发明与生命历程：专利活动中的年龄差异
28769.authors: Mary Kaltenberg, Adam B. Jaffe, Margie E. Lachman
28769.abstract: Previous research suggests creative ability peaks in the age decades of the 30s and early 40s, and declines thereafter, with some variation across fields. Building from the cognitive aging literature, we expect differences in the rate of creation and qualitative nature of creative works by age. Cognitive processes show aging-related changes with increases in experience-based knowledge (pragmatics or crystallized abilities) and decreases in the ability to process novel information quickly and efficiently (mechanics or fluid abilities). We describe a new database created by combining the publicly available patent data with information on inventor ages scraped from directory websites on the web for approximately 1.2 million U.S.-resident inventors patenting between 1976 and 2017. Our results suggest that cross-sectional and within-inventor patenting rates are similar, peaking at around the early 40s for both women and men. We find varying results for attributes of patents in relation to age, some of which are consistent with cognitive aging theory. For solo inventors, backward citations and originality, which are connected to experience, were found to increase with age. Forward citations, number of claims, and generality measures, as well as a citation-based measure of disruptiveness decline on average with inventor age. A similar pattern was found for performance in teams based on the average age of inventors in the team. Exploration of age diversity showed that teams with a wider age range had patents that are slightly more important (i.e., with more forward citations). The findings have the potential to advance scholarship on the life course of innovation with implications for workplace policies.
28769.zh_abstract: 先前的研究表明，创造能力在30多岁至40岁出头达到顶峰，之后下降，不同领域存在一些差异。基于认知老化文献，我们预期不同年龄段的创造速率和创造性作品的性质存在差异。认知过程表现出与年龄相关的变化：基于经验的知识（实用能力或晶体能力）增加，而快速有效处理新信息的能力（机械能力或流体能力）下降。我们描述了一个新数据库，该数据库通过将公开可用的专利数据与从网络目录网站抓取的、约120万美国居民发明家（在1976年至2017年间获得专利）的年龄信息相结合而创建。我们的结果表明，横截面和发明家内部的专利率相似，男性和女性均在40岁出头达到峰值。我们发现专利属性与年龄的关系存在不同结果，其中一些与认知老化理论一致。对于独立发明家，与经验相关的后向引用和原创性随年龄增长而增加。前向引用、权利要求数量和通用性指标，以及基于引用的颠覆性指标，平均随发明家年龄增长而下降。基于团队中发明家平均年龄的团队绩效也发现了类似模式。对年龄多样性的探索表明，年龄范围更广的团队获得的专利略微更重要（即前向引用更多）。这些发现有可能推进关于创新生命历程的学术研究，并对工作场所政策产生影响。

28768.title: The Age of Invention: Matching Inventor Ages to Patents Based on Web-scraped Sources
28768.zh_title: 发明的时代：基于网络抓取来源将发明家年龄与专利匹配
28768.authors: Mary Kaltenberg, Adam B. Jaffe, Margie Lachman
28768.abstract: This paper overviews the data collection procedures and resulting data for inventor ages and associated death dates. We use information about inventors from patents (name and location) and search for age and date of death information from publicly available online web directories and build a scoring system to indicate the quality of information that we collect. After applying a variety of heuristics and robustness checks, we are confident of 1,508,676 inventor ages associated with patents granted between 1976 and 2018. We also find the death dates of 206,589 inventors, though we are not as confident of the accuracy of the death information. The datasets and associated replication files are freely available at: https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/YRLSKU
28768.zh_abstract: 本文概述了发明家年龄及相关死亡日期数据的数据收集程序和最终数据。我们利用专利中的发明家信息（姓名和地点），从公开可用的在线网络目录中搜索年龄和死亡日期信息，并构建了一个评分系统来指示所收集信息的质量。在应用各种启发式方法和稳健性检验后，我们确信有1,508,676个与1976年至2018年间授予的专利相关的发明家年龄。我们还找到了206,589位发明家的死亡日期，尽管我们对死亡信息的准确性不那么确信。数据集及相关复制文件可在以下网址免费获取：https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/YRLSKU

28767.title: Are Bigger Banks Better? Firm-Level Evidence from Germany
28767.zh_title: 大银行更好吗？来自德国的企业层面证据
28767.abstract: The effects of large banks on the real economy are theoretically ambiguous and politically controversial. I identify quasi-exogenous increases in bank size in postwar Germany. I show that firms did not grow faster after their relationship banks became bigger. In fact, opaque borrowers grew more slowly. The enlarged banks did not increase profits or efficiency, but worked with riskier borrowers. Bank managers benefited through higher salaries and media attention. The paper presents newly digitized microdata on German firms and their banks. Overall, the findings reveal that bigger banks do not always raise real growth and can actually harm some borrowers.
28767.zh_abstract: 大银行对实体经济的影响在理论上具有模糊性，在政治上具有争议性。我识别了战后德国银行规模的准外生增长。我证明，在其关系银行变得更大之后，企业并未增长得更快。事实上，不透明的借款人增长得更慢。规模扩大的银行并未提高利润或效率，而是与风险更高的借款人合作。银行管理者通过更高的薪水和媒体关注度获益。本文展示了新数字化的德国企业及其银行的微观数据。总体而言，研究结果表明，更大的银行并不总能提高实际增长，实际上可能损害一些借款人。
28767.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG, IO, ME；JEL：E24, E44, G21, G28, L11, L25, N14, N24, N84

28766.title: Discrimination, Managers, and Firm Performance: Evidence from “Aryanizations” in Nazi Germany
28766.zh_title: 歧视、管理者与企业绩效：来自纳粹德国“雅利安化”的证据
28766.authors: Kilian Huber, Volker Lindenthal, Fabian Waldinger
28766.abstract: Large-scale increases in discrimination can lead to dismissals of highly qualified managers. We investigate how expulsions of senior Jewish managers, due to rising discrimination in Nazi Germany, affected large corporations. Firms that lost Jewish managers experienced persistent reductions in stock prices, dividends, and returns on assets. Aggregate market value fell by roughly 1.8 percent of German GNP because of the expulsions. Managers who served as key connectors to other firms and managers who were highly educated were particularly important for firm performance. The findings imply that individual managers drive firm performance. Discrimination against qualified business leaders causes first-order economic losses.
28766.zh_abstract: 大规模歧视的加剧可能导致高素质管理者的解雇。我们研究了纳粹德国因歧视加剧而导致的高级犹太管理者的驱逐如何影响大型企业。失去犹太管理者的企业经历了股票价格、股息和资产收益率的持续下降。由于这些驱逐，总市场价值下降了大约德国国民生产总值的1.8%。那些作为与其他企业关键连接者的管理者以及受过高等教育的管理者，对企业绩效尤为重要。这些发现意味着个体管理者驱动企业绩效。对合格商业领袖的歧视会导致一级的经济损失。
28766.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, LS, ME, POL；JEL：D22, E60, G30, J7, J71, M12, N24, N34, N8

28765.title: The Eﬀects of Disclosure and Enforcement on Payday Lending in Texas
28765.zh_title: 信息披露与执法对德克萨斯州发薪日贷款的影响
28765.abstract: Inspired by the ﬁeld experiment in Bertrand and Morse (2011), the state of Texas adopted an information disclosure for consumers taking out payday loans starting in January, 2012. The disclosure compares the cost of payday loans with other credit products, and presents their likelihood of renewal in easy-to-understand terms. Simultaneously, Austin and Dallas implemented stricter supply restrictions through city ordinances. We analyze both types of regulations, and ﬁnd that the statewide disclosures led to a signiﬁcant and persistent 13% decline in loan volume in the ﬁrst six months after implementation. The city ordinances led to a 61% decline in loan volume in Austin and a 44% decline in Dallas, with the timing of the eﬀect driven by the start of enforcement rather than the eﬀective date of regulation. The results show that both behaviorally-motivated disclosures and city-level supply restrictions can have a signiﬁcant impact on equilibrium loan quantities, with no eﬀect on prices or evidence of evasive income falsiﬁcation.
28765.zh_abstract: 受Bertrand和Morse（2011）现场实验的启发，德克萨斯州自2012年1月起对申请发薪日贷款的消费者采用了信息披露制度。该披露将发薪日贷款的成本与其他信贷产品进行比较，并以易于理解的方式呈现其续贷可能性。与此同时，奥斯汀和达拉斯通过城市法令实施了更严格的供给限制。我们分析了这两类法规，发现全州范围的信息披露在实施后的前六个月导致贷款量显著且持续地下降了13%。城市法令导致奥斯汀的贷款量下降了61%，达拉斯的贷款量下降了44%，其影响的时间点是由执法开始而非法规生效日期驱动的。结果表明，行为动机驱动的信息披露和城市层面的供给限制都能对均衡贷款量产生显著影响，而对价格没有影响，也没有发现逃避性的收入伪造证据。
28765.meta: Programs：CF, LE, PE；JEL：D12, D14, G23, G28, G41, G51

28764.title: Regulation and Security Design in Concentrated Markets
28764.zh_title: 集中市场中的监管与证券设计
28764.abstract: Regulatory debates about centralized trading assume security design is immune to market structure. We consider a regulator who introduces an exchange to increase liquidity, understanding that security design is endogenous. For a given security, investors would like to trade in a larger market and, for a given market structure, they would like to trade a safer security. We show that financial intermediaries design riskier securities after the exchange is introduced, even when the exchange leads to the origination of safer underlying assets. The results reflect a relative dilution of investor market power and motivate coordinated policies to improve investor welfare.
28764.zh_abstract: 关于集中交易的监管辩论假设证券设计不受市场结构影响。我们考虑一个引入交易所以提高流动性的监管者，并理解证券设计是内生的。对于给定的证券，投资者更愿意在更大的市场交易；对于给定的市场结构，他们更愿意交易更安全的证券。我们表明，在引入交易所后，金融中介设计出风险更高的证券，即使交易所导致了更安全基础资产的产生。这一结果反映了投资者市场力量的相对稀释，并激励协调政策以改善投资者福利。

28763.title: Have U.S. Gun Buyback Programs Misfired?
28763.zh_title: 美国的枪支回购计划是否失效？
28763.authors: Toshio Ferrazares, Joseph J. Sabia, D. Mark Anderson
28763.abstract: Gun buyback programs (GBPs), which use public funds to purchase civilians' privately-owned firearms, aim to reduce gun violence. However, next to nothing is known about their effects on firearm-related crime or deaths. Using data from the National Incident Based Reporting System, we find no evidence that GBPs reduce gun crime. Given our estimated null findings, with 95 percent confidence, we can rule out decreases in firearm-related crime of greater than 1.1 percent during the year following a buyback. Using data from the National Vital Statistics System, we also find no evidence that GBPs reduce suicides or homicides where a firearm was involved. These results call into question the efficacy of city gun buyback programs in their current form.
28763.zh_abstract: 枪支回购计划（GBPs）利用公共资金购买平民私人拥有的枪支，旨在减少枪支暴力。然而，关于其对枪支相关犯罪或死亡的影响几乎一无所知。利用来自国家事件报告系统的数据，我们没有发现GBPs减少枪支犯罪的证据。基于我们估计的零结果，在95%的置信水平下，我们可以排除回购后一年内枪支相关犯罪减少超过1.1%的可能性。利用来自国家生命统计系统的数据，我们也没有发现GBPs减少涉及枪支的自杀或他杀的证据。这些结果对当前形式的城市枪支回购计划的有效性提出了质疑。

28762.title: Adverse Selection in Medicaid: Evidence from Discontinuous Program Rules
28762.zh_title: 医疗补助中的逆向选择：来自不连续计划规则的证据
28762.authors: Betsy Q. Cliff, Sarah Miller, Jeffrey T. Kullgren, John Z. Ayanian, Richard Hirth
28762.abstract: Recent expansions of Medicaid eligibility have come with increased experimentation with enrollee cost-sharing. In this paper, we exploit a discontinuous premium increase at the federal poverty level in Michigan’s Medicaid expansion program to test low-income individuals’ sensitivity to premiums using linked enrollment and claims data. At the cutoff, average premiums increase by $\$3.15$ and the probability of disenrollment increases by 2.3 percentage points. Increased disenrollment occurs among those with fewer documented medical needs at baseline, but not among those with greater medical needs. These results suggest healthier low-income individuals may be sensitive to even modest health insurance premiums, and that premiums may induce adverse selection in Medicaid plans.
28762.zh_abstract: 最近医疗补助资格范围的扩大伴随着参保人费用分摊的更多实验。在本文中，我们利用密歇根州医疗补助扩展计划中联邦贫困线处不连续的保费增加，通过关联的参保和索赔数据来测试低收入个体对保费的敏感性。在临界点，平均保费增加3.15美元，退保概率增加2.3个百分点。退保增加发生在基线时记录医疗需求较少的个体中，但不在医疗需求较大的个体中。这些结果表明，较健康的低收入个体可能对即使是适度的健康保险保费敏感，并且保费可能在医疗补助计划中引发逆向选择。

28761.title: Quantifying Market Power and Business Dynamism in the Macroeconomy
28761.zh_title: 量化宏观经济中的市场力量与商业活力
28761.authors: Jan De Loecker, Jan Eeckhout, Simon Mongey
28761.abstract: We propose a general equilibrium economy with oligopolistic output markets in which two channels can cause a change in market power: (i) technology, via changes to productivity shocks and the cost of entry, (ii) market structure, via changes to the number of potential competitors. First, we disentangle these narratives by matching time-series on markups, labor reallocation and costs between 1980 and 2016, finding that both channels are necessary to account for the data. Second, we show that changes in technology and market structure over this period yielded positive welfare effects from reallocation and selection, but off-setting negative effects from deadweight loss and overhead. Overall, welfare is 9 percent lower in 2016 than in 1980. Third, the changes we identify replicate cross-sectional patterns in declining business dynamism, declining equilibrium wages and labor force participation, and sales reallocation toward larger, more productive firms.
28761.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个具有寡头产出市场的一般均衡经济体，其中两个渠道可能导致市场力量的变化：（i）技术，通过生产率冲击和进入成本的变化；（ii）市场结构，通过潜在竞争者数量的变化。首先，我们通过匹配1980年至2016年间加成率、劳动力重新配置和成本的时间序列来区分这些叙述，发现两个渠道对于解释数据都是必要的。其次，我们表明，这一时期技术和市场结构的变化产生了来自重新配置和选择的积极福利效应，但被来自无谓损失和间接成本的抵消性负面效应所抵消。总体而言，2016年的福利比1980年低9%。第三，我们识别的变化复制了商业活力下降、均衡工资和劳动力参与率下降以及销售重新配置向更大、生产率更高的企业集中的横截面模式。

28760.title: Behavior and the Dynamics of Epidemics
28760.abstract: I use a model of private and public behavior to mitigate disease transmission during the COVID pandemic over the past year in the United States to address two questions: What dynamics of infections and deaths should we expect to see from a pandemic? What are our options for mitigating the impact of a pandemic on public health? I find that behavior turns what would be a short and extremely sharp epidemic into a long, drawn out one. Absent the development of a technological solution such as vaccines or life-saving therapeutics, additional public health interventions suffer from rapidly diminishing returns in improving long-run outcomes. In contrast, rapidly implemented non-pharmaceutical interventions, in combination with the rapid development of technological solutions, could have saved nearly 300,000 lives relative to what is now projected to occur.
28760.zh_abstract: 我使用一个包含私人行为和公共行为以减轻美国过去一年COVID大流行期间疾病传播的模型，来解决两个问题：我们应该预期从大流行中看到怎样的感染和死亡动态？我们有哪些选择来减轻大流行对公共卫生的影响？我发现，行为将原本短暂且极其剧烈的流行病转变为漫长而持久的流行病。在缺乏疫苗或救命疗法等技术解决方案的情况下，额外的公共卫生干预措施在改善长期结果方面收益迅速递减。相比之下，快速实施的非药物干预措施，结合技术解决方案的快速发展，相对于目前预计的情况，本可以挽救近30万人的生命。

28759.title: Racial and Ethnic Differences in the Financial Returns to Home Purchases
28759.zh_title: 购房财务回报的种族和民族差异
28759.abstract: The racial and ethnic composition of home buyers varies across geographic locations. Since home prices grow at different rates across counties and within counties, these place based bets yield different average rates of return for different demographic groups. I estimate these differential returns by combining micro data from HMDA with zip code level data from Zillow. Based on this index of housing returns from 2010 to 2022, I find that at the national level that Asian buyers earn higher returns than other groups. For California buyers and for Los Angeles buyers, Black people earn roughly the same average rate of return but face a higher standard deviation in returns than other groups.
28759.zh_abstract: 购房者的种族和民族构成因地理位置而异。由于房价在不同县和县内以不同速度增长，这些基于地点的押注为不同人口群体带来了不同的平均回报率。我通过将HMDA的微观数据与Zillow的邮政编码级数据相结合来估计这些差异回报。基于2010年至2022年的住房回报指数，我发现全国范围内，亚裔购房者获得的回报高于其他群体。对于加利福尼亚州和洛杉矶的购房者，黑人获得的平均回报率大致相同，但回报的标准差高于其他群体。

28758.title: Trade Protection, Stock-Market Returns, and Welfare
28758.zh_title: 贸易保护、股票市场回报与福利
28758.authors: Mary Amiti, Matthieu Gomez, Sang Hoon Kong, David Weinstein
28758.abstract: Tariff announcements during the U.S.-China trade war had large and broad effects on financial variables: stock prices fell, yields declined, and risk premia rose. The stock-price reactions were heterogeneous in the cross-section during 2018–19—firms that imported from, exported to, or sold in China experienced significantly worse returns than other firms. These cross-sectional differences in announcement-day returns forecast subsequent declines in profits, sales, employment, and investment. Using a specific factors model, we show that these asset price movements can help identify the welfare impact of tariffs. We estimate that the trade war substantially reduced U.S. welfare.
28758.zh_abstract: 中美贸易战期间的关税公告对金融变量产生了广泛而显著的影响：股价下跌、收益率下降、风险溢价上升。2018-19年间，股票价格反应在横截面上存在异质性——从中国进口、向中国出口或在中国销售的公司，其回报显著差于其他公司。这些公告日回报的横截面差异预测了随后利润、销售、就业和投资的下降。利用特定要素模型，我们表明这些资产价格变动有助于识别关税的福利影响。我们估计贸易战大幅降低了美国福利。

28757.title: Four Decades of Canadian Earnings Inequality and Dynamics across Workers and Firms
28757.zh_title: 加拿大收入不平等与工人和企业动态的四十年
28757.authors: Audra Bowlus, Émilien Gouin-Bonenfant, Huju Liu, Lance Lochner, Youngmin Park
28757.abstract: This paper studies the evolution of individual earnings inequality and dynamics in Canada from 1983 to 2016 using tax files and administrative records. Linking these individuals to their employers (and rich administrative records on firms) beginning in 2001, it also documents the relationship between the earnings dynamics of workers and the size and growth of their employers. It highlights three main patterns over this period: First, with a few exceptions (sharp increase in top 1% and declining gender gap), Canada has experienced relatively modest changes in overall earnings inequality, volatility, and mobility between 1983 and 2016. Second, there is considerable variability in earnings inequality and volatility over the business cycle. Third, the earnings dynamics of individuals are strongly related to the size and employment growth of their employers.
28757.zh_abstract: 本文利用税务档案和行政记录，研究了1983年至2016年加拿大个人收入不平等和动态的演变。通过将这些个人与其雇主（以及自2001年起丰富的企业行政记录）联系起来，本文还记录了工人收入动态与其雇主规模和增长之间的关系。本文强调了这一时期三个主要模式：第一，除少数例外（前1%收入份额急剧上升和性别差距缩小），加拿大在1983年至2016年间整体收入不平等、波动性和流动性经历了相对温和的变化。第二，收入不平等和波动性在经济周期中存在相当大的变化。第三，个人的收入动态与其雇主的规模和就业增长密切相关。
28757.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E24, J24, J31, J62, L25

28756.title: The Long-Term Effects of Universal Preschool in Boston
28756.zh_title: 波士顿全民学前教育的长期效应
28756.authors: Guthrie Gray-Lobe, Parag A. Pathak, Christopher R. Walters
28756.abstract: We use admissions lotteries to estimate the effects of large-scale public preschool in Boston on college-going, college preparation, standardized test scores, and behavioral outcomes. Preschool enrollment boosts college attendance, as well as SAT test-taking and high school graduation. Preschool also decreases several disciplinary measures including juvenile incarceration, but has no detectable impact on state achievement test scores. An analysis of subgroups shows that effects on college enrollment, SAT-taking, and disciplinary outcomes are larger for boys than for girls. Our findings illustrate possibilities for large-scale modern, public preschool and highlight the importance of measuring long-term and non-test score outcomes in evaluating the effectiveness of education programs.
28756.zh_abstract: 我们利用入学抽签来估计波士顿大规模公立学前教育对大学入学、大学准备、标准化考试成绩和行为结果的影响。学前教育提高了大学入学率、SAT考试参与率和高中毕业率。学前教育还减少了几项纪律处分措施，包括青少年监禁，但对州学业成就测试成绩没有可检测的影响。对子群体的分析显示，对大学入学、SAT考试参与和纪律处分结果的影响，男孩大于女孩。我们的发现展示了现代大规模公立学前教育的可能性，并强调了在评估教育项目有效性时衡量长期和非考试成绩结果的重要性。
28756.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I20, I21, I24, I28

28755.title: Which Markets (Don't) Drive Pharmaceutical Innovation? Evidence From U.S. Medicaid Expansions
28755.zh_title: 哪些市场（不）驱动医药创新？来自美国医疗补助扩张的证据
28755.authors: Craig Garthwaite, Rebecca Sachs, Ariel Dora Stern
28755.abstract: Pharmaceutical innovation policy involves managing a tradeoff between high prices for new products in the short-term and stronger incentives to develop products for the future. Prior research has documented a causal relationship between market size and pharmaceutical research and development (R&D) activities. The existing literature, however, provides no evidence of how this relationship varies across markets. We investigate whether recent expansions in state Medicaid programs caused an increase in R&D. We find no evidence of a response, potentially a result of Medicaid’s low reimbursement for pharmaceuticals, suggesting low(er) price markets may have different dynamics with respect to innovation policy.
28755.zh_abstract: 医药创新政策涉及管理短期新产品高价格与为未来开发产品提供更强激励之间的权衡。先前的研究记录了市场规模与医药研发活动之间的因果关系。然而，现有文献没有提供这种关系如何在不同市场间变化的证据。我们调查了近期各州医疗补助项目的扩张是否导致了研发的增加。我们没有发现反应的证据，这可能是医疗补助对药品报销水平低的结果，表明低价格市场在创新政策方面可能具有不同的动态。
28755.meta: Programs：EH, PE, PR；JEL：H0, I1, L43, L5, O3

28754.title: Welfare and Output with Income Effects and Taste Shocks
28754.zh_title: 具有收入效应和品味冲击的福利与产出
28754.abstract: We present a unified treatment of how welfare responds to changes in budget sets or technologies with taste shocks and non-homothetic preferences. We propose a welfare metric that ranks production possibility frontiers that differs from one that ranks budget sets, and characterize it using a general equilibrium generalization of Hicksian demand. This extends Hulten’s theorem, the basis for constructing aggregate quantity indices, to environments with non-homothetic and unstable preferences. We illustrate our results using both long- and short-run applications. In the long run, we show that if structural transformation is caused by income effects or changes in tastes, rather than substitution effects, then Baumol’s cost disease is twice as important for our preferred measure of welfare. In the short run, we show that standard chain-weighted deflators understate welfare-relevant inflation for current tastes. Finally, using the Covid-19 recession we illustrate that chain-weighted real consumption and real GDP are unreliable metrics for measuring welfare or production when there are taste shocks.
28754.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个统一的处理方法，探讨在存在品味冲击和非位似偏好的情况下，福利如何响应预算集或技术的变化。我们提出了一种福利度量，用于对生产可能性边界进行排序，这与对预算集进行排序的度量不同，并使用希克斯需求的一般均衡推广来刻画它。这扩展了作为构建总量数量指数基础的Hulten定理，使其适用于非位似和不稳定偏好的环境。我们通过长期和短期应用来说明我们的结果。在长期中，我们表明，如果结构转型是由收入效应或品味变化而非替代效应引起的，那么鲍莫尔成本病对我们偏好的福利度量来说重要两倍。在短期中，我们表明，标准的链式加权平减指数低估了当前品味下的福利相关通胀。最后，利用新冠疫情衰退，我们说明当存在品味冲击时，链式加权实际消费和实际GDP是衡量福利或生产的不可靠指标。
28754.meta: Programs：EFG, PR；JEL：E0, E01, E1, E21, E23, E3

28752.title: Widows’ Time, Time Stress and Happiness: Adjusting to Loss
28752.zh_title: 寡妇的时间、时间压力与幸福感：适应失去
28752.authors: Daniel S. Hamermesh, Michał Myck, Monika Oczkowska
28752.abstract: By age 77 a plurality of women in wealthy Western societies are widows. Comparing older (aged 70+) married women to widows in the American Time Use Survey 2003-18 and linking the data to the Current Population Survey allow inferring the short- and longer-term effects of an arguably exogenous shock—husband’s death—and measuring the paths of adjustment of time use to it. Widows differ from otherwise similar married women, especially from married women with working husbands, by cutting back on home production, mainly food preparation and housework, mostly by engaging in less of it each day, not doing it less frequently. French, Italian, German, and Dutch widows behave similarly. Widows are alone for 2/3 of the time they had spent with their spouses, with a small increase in time with friends and relatives shortly after becoming widowed. Evidence from the European countries shows that widows feel less time stress than married women but are also less satisfied with their lives. Following older women in 18 European countries before and after a partner’s death shows that widowhood reduces their feelings of time pressure. U.S. longitudinal data demonstrate that it increases feelings of depression. Most of the adjustment of time use in response to widowhood occurs within one year of the husband’s death; but feelings of reduced time pressure and of depression persist much longer.
28752.zh_abstract: 到77岁时，富裕西方社会中的多数女性是寡妇。通过比较美国时间使用调查（2003-18年）中70岁及以上的已婚女性和寡妇，并将数据与当前人口调查相关联，可以推断出一个可视为外生冲击——丈夫去世——的短期和长期影响，并衡量时间使用对其调整的路径。寡妇与在其他方面相似的已婚女性不同，尤其是与丈夫有工作的已婚女性相比，她们减少了家庭生产，主要是食物准备和家务，这主要是通过每天减少从事这些活动的时间，而不是减少频率。法国、意大利、德国和荷兰的寡妇行为类似。寡妇在原本与配偶共度的时间中有三分之二的时间是独自一人，在成为寡妇后不久，与朋友和亲戚相处的时间略有增加。来自欧洲国家的证据表明，寡妇比已婚女性感受到的时间压力更小，但对生活的满意度也更低。跟踪18个欧洲国家老年女性在伴侣去世前后的情况表明，丧偶减少了她们的时间紧迫感。美国纵向数据表明，丧偶增加了抑郁感。对丧偶的时间使用调整大多发生在丈夫去世后一年内；但时间压力减轻和抑郁感持续更长时间。

28751.title: Private Equity and Financial Stability: Evidence from Failed Bank Resolution in the Crisis
28751.zh_title: 私募股权与金融稳定：危机中失败银行处置的证据
28751.authors: Emily Johnston-Ross, Song Ma, Manju Puri
28751.abstract: This paper investigates the role of private equity (PE) in failed bank resolutions after the 2008 financial crisis, using proprietary FDIC failed bank acquisition data. PE investors made substantial investments in underperforming and riskier failed banks, particularly in geographies where local banks were also distressed, filling the gap created by a weak, undercapitalized banking sector. Using a quasi-random empirical design based on detailed bidding information, we show PE-acquired banks performed better ex post, with positive real effects for the local economy. Overall, PE investors had a positive role in stabilizing the financial system through their involvement in failed bank resolution.
28751.zh_abstract: 本文利用FDIC专有的失败银行收购数据，研究了私募股权在2008年金融危机后失败银行处置中的作用。私募股权投资者对表现不佳且风险更高的失败银行进行了大量投资，尤其是在当地银行也陷入困境的地区，填补了疲弱、资本不足的银行业留下的空白。利用基于详细投标信息的准随机实证设计，我们表明私募股权收购的银行事后表现更好，对当地经济产生了积极的实际影响。总体而言，私募股权投资者通过参与失败银行处置，在稳定金融体系方面发挥了积极作用。

28750.title: The Effect of Education on the Relationship between Genetics, Early-Life Disadvantages, and Later-Life SES
28750.zh_title: 教育对遗传、早期劣势与后期社会经济地位之间关系的影响
28750.authors: Silvia H. Barcellos, Leandro Carvalho, Patrick Turley
28750.abstract: This paper investigates whether education weakens the relationship between early-life disadvantages and later-life SES. We use three proxies for advantage that we show are independently associated with SES in middle-age. Besides early, favorable family and neighborhood conditions, we argue that the genes a child inherits also represent a source of advantages. Using a regression discontinuity design and data for over 110,000 individuals, we study a compulsory schooling reform in the UK that generated exogenous variation in schooling. While the reform succeeded in reducing educational disparities, it did not weaken the relationship between early-life disadvantages and wages. This implies that advantaged children had higher returns to schooling. We exploit family-based random genetic variation and find no evidence that these higher returns were driven by genetically-influenced individual characteristics such as innate ability or skills.
28750.zh_abstract: 本文研究教育是否削弱了早期生活劣势与后期社会经济地位之间的关系。我们使用三个优势代理变量，并证明它们与中年时期的社会经济地位独立相关。除了早期有利的家庭和邻里条件外，我们认为儿童继承的基因也代表了一种优势来源。利用断点回归设计和超过11万人的数据，我们研究了英国一项义务教育改革，该改革产生了学校教育的外生变化。虽然改革成功减少了教育差距，但它并未削弱早期生活劣势与工资之间的关系。这意味着优势儿童的教育回报更高。我们利用基于家庭的随机遗传变异，没有发现证据表明这些更高的回报是由遗传影响的个体特征（如先天能力或技能）驱动的。
28750.meta: Programs：AG, CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I24, I26, J31

28799.title: Are High-Interest Loans Predatory? Theory and Evidence from Payday Lending
28799.zh_title: 高息贷款是掠夺性的吗？来自发薪日贷款的理论与证据
28799.authors: Hunt Allcott, Joshua J. Kim, Dmitry Taubinsky, Jonathan Zinman
28799.abstract: It is often argued that people might take on too much high-cost debt because they are present focused and/or overoptimistic about how soon they will repay. We measure borrowers' present focus and overoptimism using an experiment with a large payday lender. Although the most inexperienced quartile of borrowers underestimate their likelihood of future borrowing, the more experienced three quartiles predict correctly on average. This finding contrasts sharply with priors we elicited from 103 payday lending and behavioral economics experts, who believed that the average borrower would be highly overoptimistic about getting out of debt. Borrowers are willing to pay a significant premium for an experimental incentive to avoid future borrowing, which we show implies that they perceive themselves to be time inconsistent. We use borrowers' predicted behavior and valuation of the experimental incentive to estimate a model of present focus and naivete. We then use the model to study common payday lending regulations. In our model, banning payday loans reduces welfare relative to existing regulation, while limits on repeat borrowing might increase welfare by inducing faster repayment that is more consistent with long-run preferences.
28799.zh_abstract: 人们常常认为，由于人们关注当下和/或对自己何时能还款过于乐观，他们可能会借入过多的高成本债务。我们利用一家大型发薪日贷款机构的实验来衡量借款人的当下关注和过度乐观。尽管最缺乏经验的四分之一借款人低估了他们未来借款的可能性，但更有经验的四分之三借款人平均而言预测正确。这一发现与我们向103位发薪日贷款和行为经济学专家征集的先验观点形成鲜明对比，这些专家认为普通借款人会对自己摆脱债务的能力高度过度乐观。借款人愿意为一项避免未来借款的实验性激励支付显著溢价，我们表明这意味着他们认为自己存在时间不一致性。我们利用借款人的预测行为和对实验性激励的估值来估计一个关于当下关注和天真的模型。然后，我们使用该模型来研究常见的发薪日贷款监管。在我们的模型中，与现有监管相比，禁止发薪日贷款会降低福利，而对重复借款的限制可能会通过促使更快的还款（更符合长期偏好）来提高福利。
28799.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D14, D15, D18, D61, D90, L69

28798.title: Is Public Equity Deadly? Evidence from Workplace Safety and Productivity Tradeoffs in the Coal Industry
28798.zh_title: 公开股权是致命的吗？来自煤炭行业工作场所安全与生产率权衡的证据
28798.authors: Erik P. Gilje, Michael D. Wittry
28798.abstract: We study how ownership structure, in particular public listing status, affects workplace safety and productivity tradeoffs. Theory offers competing hypotheses on how listing related frictions affect these tradeoffs. We exploit detailed asset-level data in the U.S. coal industry and find that workplace safety deteriorates dramatically under public firm ownership, primarily in mines that experience the largest productivity increases. We find evidence consistent with information asymmetry between managers and shareholders of public firms, and ties of private firm ownership with local communities being first-order drivers of workplace safety and productivity tradeoffs.
28798.zh_abstract: 我们研究所有权结构，特别是公开上市状态，如何影响工作场所安全与生产率的权衡。理论对于上市相关摩擦如何影响这些权衡提出了相互竞争的假设。我们利用美国煤炭行业详细的资产层面数据，发现公开公司所有权下的工作场所安全状况急剧恶化，主要发生在经历最大生产率增长的煤矿中。我们发现的证据与以下观点一致：上市公司管理层与股东之间的信息不对称，以及私营公司所有权与当地社区的联系，是工作场所安全与生产率权衡的一阶驱动因素。

28797.title: Globalization and the Environment
28797.authors: Brian R. Copeland, Joseph S. Shapiro, M. Scott Taylor
28797.abstract: How should international economic policy address climate change? Does trade cause deforestation and endangered species depletion? How does globalization affect air and water pollution? Do trade and investment create a race to the bottom in environmental policy? How important are environmental impacts of transporting goods? We review theory and empirical work linking international trade and the environment with a focus on recent work and methods. We discuss the literature linking trade to local and global pollutants, the impact of emissions from transportation, the effect of trade on the sustainability of renewable resources, and the interaction between trade and climate policy. To shape our review, we present nine new stylized facts that, together with our review of past work, highlight questions for future research.
28797.zh_abstract: 国际经济政策应如何应对气候变化？贸易是否会导致森林砍伐和濒危物种枯竭？全球化如何影响空气和水污染？贸易和投资是否会在环境政策方面引发逐底竞争？货物运输的环境影响有多重要？我们回顾了将国际贸易与环境联系起来的理论和实证工作，重点关注近期的工作和方法。我们讨论了将贸易与地方和全球污染物联系起来的文献、运输排放的影响、贸易对可再生资源可持续性的影响，以及贸易与气候政策之间的相互作用。为了塑造我们的综述，我们提出了九个新的典型事实，这些事实连同我们对过去工作的回顾，突出了未来研究的问题。

28796.title: Loss Aversion in Housing Sales Prices: Evidence from Focal Point Bias
28796.zh_title: 住房销售价格中的损失厌恶：来自锚定偏差的证据
28796.abstract: Estimates of loss aversion in housing sales prices may be biased because expected losses correlate with housing and borrower unobservables. We provide new evidence of loss aversion in sales price by differencing loss aversion estimates between sellers who exhibit focal point bias in their initial mortgage amount and those who do not. Although focal point bias and loss aversion are associated with different families of behaviors, recent evidence suggests links between these biases. Revisiting experimental data, subjects with high levels of loss aversion were more likely to use round numbers. Using housing data, estimates of loss aversion are 10 percentage points higher for sellers with round number mortgage amounts as a share of expected loss. Differences in expected loss are balanced over both housing and mortgage attributes, are stable as additional of controls are added, and are robust to using a discontinuity style regression centered on mortgage amounts of round numbers. On the other hand, traditional estimates of loss aversion fall by as much as 73 percent as additional controls are added. This study provides unique evidence that loss aversion and focal point bias are found together, and presents new, more robust evidence that loss aversion influences housing sales prices.
28796.zh_abstract: 住房销售价格中损失厌恶的估计可能存在偏差，因为预期损失与住房和借款人的不可观测特征相关。我们通过比较在初始抵押贷款金额上表现出锚定偏差的卖家与未表现出该偏差的卖家之间的损失厌恶估计差异，提供了销售价格中损失厌恶的新证据。尽管锚定偏差和损失厌恶与不同的行为类别相关，但近期证据表明这些偏差之间存在联系。重新审视实验数据，损失厌恶程度高的受试者更倾向于使用整数。利用住房数据，对于抵押贷款金额为整数的卖家，其损失厌恶估计值（以预期损失份额衡量）高出10个百分点。预期损失的差异在住房和抵押贷款属性上保持平衡，随着控制变量的增加而保持稳定，并且在使用以整数抵押贷款金额为中心的断点回归时依然稳健。另一方面，随着控制变量的增加，传统的损失厌恶估计值下降了多达73%。这项研究提供了独特的证据，表明损失厌恶和锚定偏差同时存在，并提出了新的、更稳健的证据，证明损失厌恶影响住房销售价格。

28795.title: The Macroeconomic Effects of a Carbon Tax to Meet the U.S. Paris Agreement Target: The Role of Firm Creation and Technology Adoption
28795.zh_title: 为实现美国《巴黎协定》目标的碳税的宏观经济效应：企业创建与技术采用的作用
28795.authors: Alan Finkelstein Shapiro, Gilbert E. Metcalf
28795.abstract: We analyze the quantitative labor market and aggregate effects of a carbon tax in a framework with pollution externalities and equilibrium unemployment. Our model incorporates endogenous labor force participation and two margins of adjustment influenced by carbon taxes: (1) firm creation and (2) green production-technology adoption. A carbon-tax policy that reduces carbon emissions by 35 percent – roughly the emissions reductions that will be required under the Biden Administration's new commitment under the Paris Agreement – and transfers the tax revenue to households generates mild positive long-run effects on consumption and output; a marginal increase in the unemployment and labor force participation rates; and an expansion in the number and fraction of firms that use green technologies. In the short term, the adjustment to higher carbon taxes is accompanied by gradual gains in output and consumption and a negligible expansion in unemployment. Critically, abstracting from endogenous firm entry and green-technology adoption implies that the same policy has substantial adverse short- and long-term effects on labor income, consumption, and output. Our findings highlight the importance of these margins for a comprehensive assessment of the labor market and aggregate effects of carbon taxes.
28795.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含污染外部性和均衡失业的框架中，分析了碳税对劳动力市场和总量的量化影响。我们的模型纳入了内生劳动力参与，以及受碳税影响的两个调整边际：（1）企业创建和（2）绿色生产技术采用。一项将碳排放减少35%（大致相当于拜登政府在《巴黎协定》下新承诺所需的减排量）并将税收收入转移给家庭的碳税政策，对消费和产出产生了温和的长期积极影响；失业率和劳动力参与率略有上升；使用绿色技术的企业数量和比例有所扩大。在短期内，向更高碳税的调整伴随着产出和消费的逐步增长以及失业率的可忽略不计的扩大。关键的是，忽略内生企业进入和绿色技术采用意味着同样的政策对劳动收入、消费和产出会产生显著的短期和长期不利影响。我们的研究结果强调了这些边际对于全面评估碳税对劳动力市场和总量影响的重要性。
28795.meta: Programs：EEE, PE, PR；JEL：E20, E24, E62, H23, O33, Q52, Q54, Q55, Q58

28794.title: The Legal Origins of Financial Development: Evidence from the Shanghai Concessions
28794.zh_title: 金融发展的法律渊源：来自上海租界的证据
28794.authors: Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Chicheng Ma, Yuchen Xu
28794.abstract: We assemble new data on the British and French concessions in Shanghai between 1845 and 1936 to assess the legal origins view of financial development. During this period, two regime changes altered the degree to which the British common and French civil law traditions held jurisdiction over the respective concessions: the 1869 formation of the Mixed Courts strengthened Western legal jurisdiction, while the 1926 rendition agreement returned those courts to Chinese control. By examining the changing application of different legal traditions to adjacent neighborhoods within the same city, we address identification challenges associated with cross-country studies. Consistent with the legal origins view, the financial development advantage in the British concession widened after the formation of the Courts and shrank after their rendition.
28794.zh_abstract: 我们整理了1845年至1936年间上海英租界和法租界的新数据，以评估金融发展的法律渊源观点。在此期间，两次制度变迁改变了英国普通法和法国民法传统对各自租界管辖权的程度：1869年混合法庭的成立加强了西方司法管辖权，而1926年的交还协议将这些法庭归还给中国控制。通过考察同一城市内相邻街区不同法律传统应用的变迁，我们解决了跨国研究中面临的识别挑战。与法律渊源观点一致，英租界的金融发展优势在混合法庭成立后扩大，并在法庭交还后缩小。
28794.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LE；JEL：G21, K4, N25, O16

28793.title: Property Rights and Urban Form
28793.authors: Simeon Djankov, Edward L. Glaeser, Valeria Perotti, Andrei Shleifer
28793.abstract: How do the different elements in the standard bundle of property rights, including those of possession and transfer, influence the shape of cities? This paper incorporates insecure property rights into a standard model of urban land prices and density, and makes predictions about investment in land and property, informality, and the efficiency of land use. Our empirical analysis links data on institutions for land titling and transfer with multiple urban outcomes, in 190 countries. The evidence is generally consistent with the model’s predictions, and more broadly with the Demsetz’s (1967) approach to property rights institutions. Indeed, we document world-wide improvements in the quality of institutions facilitating property transfer over time.
28793.zh_abstract: 标准产权束中的不同要素，包括占有权和转让权，如何影响城市的形态？本文将不安全的产权纳入城市土地价格和密度的标准模型，并对土地和财产投资、非正规性以及土地利用效率做出预测。我们的实证分析将190个国家的土地所有权和转让制度数据与多个城市结果联系起来。证据总体上与模型的预测一致，并且更广泛地符合德姆塞茨（1967）关于产权制度的方法。事实上，我们记录了全球范围内促进财产转让的制度质量随时间推移的改善。

28792.title: The Aggregate and Distributional Effects of Spatial Frictions
28792.zh_title: 空间摩擦的总量与分配效应
28792.abstract: We develop a general equilibrium model of frictional labor reallocation across firms and regions, and use it to quantify the aggregate and distributional effects of spatial frictions that hinder worker mobility across regions in Germany. The model leverages matched employer-employee data to unpack spatial frictions into different types while isolating them from labor market frictions that operate also within region. The estimated model shows sizable spatial frictions between East and West Germany, especially due to the limited ability of workers to obtain job offers from more distant regions. Despite the large real wage gap between East and West of Germany, removing the spatial frictions leads, in equilibrium, to only a small increase in aggregate productivity and it mostly affects the within-region allocation of labor to firms rather than the between-region allocation. However, spatial frictions have large distributional consequences, as their removal drastically reduces the gap in lifetime earnings between East and West Germans.
28792.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含企业和地区间摩擦性劳动力重新配置的一般均衡模型，并用其量化了阻碍德国地区间工人流动的空间摩擦的总量和分配效应。该模型利用匹配的雇主-雇员数据，将空间摩擦分解为不同类型，同时将其与也在地区内运作的劳动力市场摩擦分离开来。估计模型显示，东德和西德之间存在显著的空间摩擦，特别是由于工人从更远地区获得工作机会的能力有限。尽管东德和西德之间存在巨大的实际工资差距，但消除空间摩擦在均衡中仅导致总生产率的小幅提升，并且主要影响劳动力在企业间的地区内配置，而非地区间配置。然而，空间摩擦具有巨大的分配后果，因为消除它们会大幅缩小东德和西德居民之间的终生收入差距。

28791.title: Life Satisfaction and Body Mass Index: Estimating the Monetary Value of Achieving Optimal Body Weight
28791.zh_title: 生活满意度与身体质量指数：估算达到最佳体重的货币价值
28791.authors: Kristjana Baldursdottir, Paul McNamee, Edward C. Norton, Tinna Laufey Asgeirsdóttir
28791.abstract: According to the World Health Organization, obesity is one of the greatest public-health challenges of the 21st century. Body weight is also known to affect individuals’ self-esteem and interpersonal relationships, including romantic ones. We estimate “utility-maximizing” Body Mass Index (BMI) and calculate the implied monetary value of changes in both individual and spousal BMI, using the compensating income variation method and data from the Swiss Household Panel. Two-stage least squares models are estimated for women and men separately, with mother’s education as an instrument to account for the potential endogeneity in income. Results suggest that the optimal own BMI is 27.4 and 22.7 for men and women, respectively. The annual value of reaching optimal weight ranges from $\$3,235$ for underweight women to $\$32,378$ for obese women and from $\$19,088$ for underweight men to $\$43,175$ for obese men. Women on average value changes in their own BMI about three times higher than changes in their spouse’s BMI. Men, on the other hand, value a reduction in their spouse’s BMI almost twice as much compared to a reduction in their own BMI.
28791.zh_abstract: 根据世界卫生组织的说法，肥胖是21世纪最大的公共卫生挑战之一。已知体重还会影响个人的自尊和人际关系，包括恋爱关系。我们利用补偿性收入变化方法和瑞士家庭面板数据，估算了“效用最大化”的身体质量指数（BMI），并计算了个人和配偶BMI变化的隐含货币价值。分别对女性和男性估计了两阶段最小二乘模型，以母亲的教育程度作为工具变量，以解决收入潜在的内生性问题。结果表明，男性和女性的最佳自身BMI分别为27.4和22.7。达到最佳体重的年价值范围从体重过轻女性的3,235美元到肥胖女性的32,378美元，以及从体重过轻男性的19,088美元到肥胖男性的43,175美元。女性平均对自身BMI变化的重视程度是对配偶BMI变化的三倍左右。另一方面，男性对配偶BMI降低的重视程度几乎是自身BMI降低的两倍。

28790.title: The Effects of Career and Technical Education: Evidence from the Connecticut Technical High School System
28790.zh_title: 职业与技术教育的效果：来自康涅狄格州技术高中系统的证据
28790.authors: Eric Brunner, Shaun Dougherty, Stephen L. Ross
28790.abstract: We examine the effect of attending stand-alone technical high schools on student short- and long-term outcomes using a regression discontinuity design. Male students are 10 percentage points more likely to graduate from high school and have half a semester less time enrolled in college, although effects on college fade-out. Male students have 32% higher quarterly earnings. Earnings effects may in part reflect general skills: male students have higher attendance rates and test scores, and industry fixed effects explain less than 1/3rd of earnings gains. We find little evidence that attending a technical high school affects the outcomes of female students.
28790.zh_abstract: 我们使用断点回归设计，考察了就读独立技术高中对学生短期和长期结果的影响。男学生高中毕业的可能性高出10个百分点，大学入学时间减少半个学期，尽管对大学的影响会逐渐消失。男学生的季度收入高出32%。收入效应可能部分反映了通用技能：男学生的出勤率和考试成绩更高，行业固定效应解释了不到三分之一的收入增长。我们发现几乎没有证据表明就读技术高中会影响女学生的结果。

28789.title: Endogenous Driving Behavior in Tests of Racial Profiling
28789.zh_title: 种族定性测试中的内生驾驶行为
28789.authors: Jesse Kalinowski, Matthew B. Ross, Stephen L. Ross
28789.abstract: African-American motorists may adjust their driving in response to increased scrutiny by police. In daylight, when their race is more easily observable, minority motorists are the only group less likely to have fatal motor vehicle accidents. In Massachusetts and Tennessee, we find that African-Americans are the only group of stopped motorists with slower speeds in daylight. Consistent with an illustrative model, these speed shifts are concentrated at higher percentiles of the distribution. Calibration of this model indicates this behavior creates substantial bias in conventional tests of discrimination that rely on changes in the odds a stopped motorist is a minority.
28789.zh_abstract: 非裔美国驾车者可能会根据警察的加强审查调整其驾驶行为。在白天，当他们的种族更容易被观察到时，少数族裔驾车者是唯一一个致命机动车事故可能性更低的群体。在马萨诸塞州和田纳西州，我们发现非裔美国人是唯一一个被拦停的驾车者群体中白天速度更慢的。与一个说明性模型一致，这些速度变化集中在分布的高百分位。该模型的校准表明，这种行为在依赖被拦停驾车者是少数族裔的几率变化的传统歧视测试中造成了显著偏差。
28789.meta: Programs：LE, PE；JEL：H11, I38, J71, J78, K14, K42, R41

28788.title: The Cross-Section of Household Preferences
28788.zh_title: 家庭偏好的横截面分析
28788.authors: Laurent E. Calvet, John Y. Campbell, Francisco Gomes, Paolo Sodini
28788.abstract: This paper estimates the cross-sectional distribution of Epstein-Zin preferences using the wealth and risky portfolio shares of a large panel of Swedish households. We find modestly heterogeneous risk aversion (a standard deviation of 0.97 with a median of 7.50) and a meaningfully heterogeneous and right-skewed time preference rate (standard deviation 7.31% with a median of 4.08%) and elasticity of intertemporal substitution (standard deviation 3.17 with a median of 0.70). Risk aversion and the EIS are only very weakly negatively correlated. We estimate lower risk aversion for households with riskier labor income, and a higher TPR and lower EIS for households who enter our sample with low wealth.
28788.zh_abstract: 本文利用瑞典大量家庭的面板数据中的财富和风险资产份额，估计了Epstein-Zin偏好的横截面分布。我们发现风险厌恶存在适度异质性（标准差为0.97，中位数为7.50），时间偏好率存在显著异质性且呈右偏分布（标准差为7.31%，中位数为4.08%），跨期替代弹性也存在显著异质性（标准差为3.17，中位数为0.70）。风险厌恶与跨期替代弹性之间仅存在非常微弱的负相关。我们估计，劳动收入风险较高的家庭风险厌恶程度较低，而进入样本时财富较低的家庭则具有较高的时间偏好率和较低的跨期替代弹性。

28787.title: How is COVID Changing the Geography of Entrepreneurship? Evidence from the Startup Cartography Project
28787.zh_title: 新冠疫情如何改变创业的地理格局？来自创业制图项目的证据
28787.authors: Catherine E. Fazio, Jorge Guzman, Yupeng Liu, Scott Stern
28787.abstract: Leveraging data from eight U.S. states from the Startup Cartography Project, this paper provides new insight into the changing nature and geography of entrepreneurship in the wake of the COVID pandemic. Consistent with other data sources, following an initial decline, the overall level of state-level business registrations not only rebounds but increases across all eight states. We focus here on the significant heterogeneity in this dynamic pattern of new firm formation across and within states. Specifically, there are significant differences in the dynamics of new business registrants across neighborhoods in terms of race and socioeconomic status. Areas including a higher proportion of Black residents, and more specifically higher median income Black neighborhoods, are associated with higher growth in startup formation rates between 2019 and 2020. Moreover, these dynamics are reflected in the passage of the major Federal relief packages. Even though legislation such as the CARES Act did not directly support new business formation, the passage and implementation of relief packages was followed by a relative increase in start-up formation rates, particularly in neighborhoods with higher median incomes and a higher proportion of Black residents.
28787.zh_abstract: 本文利用创业制图项目来自美国八个州的数据，为新冠疫情后创业性质与地理格局的变化提供了新见解。与其他数据来源一致，在经历了最初的下降之后，各州的企业注册总量不仅反弹，而且在所有八个州均有所增长。我们重点关注各州内部及跨州之间新企业形成动态模式的显著异质性。具体而言，不同种族和社会经济地位的社区在新企业注册者的动态变化上存在显著差异。在2019年至2020年间，黑人居民比例较高，特别是中等收入较高的黑人社区，其创业形成率增长更高。此外，这些动态变化也反映在主要联邦救助计划的通过中。尽管诸如《CARES法案》之类的立法并未直接支持新企业形成，但救助计划的通过和实施之后，创业形成率相对上升，尤其是在中等收入较高且黑人居民比例较高的社区。

28786.title: Merger or Acquisition? Introduction to the Handbook of Historical Economics
28786.zh_title: 合并还是收购？《历史经济学手册》导论
28786.abstract: The relationship between history and economics as academic disciplines is methodologically subtle and sociologically contested. If the Cliometric revolution can be characterized as an acquisition of economics by history, the most recent trends in Historical Economics appear to turn this relationship on its head. In this Introduction we read the chapters of the Handbook as a forceful argument in favor of a merger between the two disciplines rather than the acquisition of one by the other; a merger which combines, notably, the detailed knowledge of historical sources, the capability of distilling complex historical processes into a model, and the statistical/econometric skills for identification and estimation.
28786.zh_abstract: 历史学与经济学作为学科之间的关系，在方法论上微妙，在社会学上存在争议。如果说计量史学革命可以被描述为历史学对经济学的收购，那么历史经济学的最新趋势似乎颠覆了这种关系。在本导论中，我们将《手册》的各章节解读为一个有力的论点，支持两个学科之间的合并，而非一方收购另一方；这种合并尤其结合了对历史资料的详细了解、将复杂历史过程提炼为模型的能力，以及用于识别和估计的统计/计量经济学技能。
